programme.desc: Kisah Putri yang cuba memenangi semula hati teman lelakinya dengan menyertai pertandingan futsal wanita bersama rakan-rakannya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu, mereka belajar tentang persahabatan, keyakinan diri dan makna sebenar cinta.(n)

programme.title: 3 Dara Pinggiran
programme.desc: 3 Dara Pinggiran mengisahkan tiga wanita dari latar hidup berbeza yang bergelut dengan cabaran hidup, cinta dan keluarga. Walaupun sering berdepan masalah dan salah faham, mereka saling menyokong antara satu sama lain dalam mencari kebahagiaan dan arah hidup masing-masing.(n)

programme.title: Istanbul Aku Datang
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda dari Malaysia pergi ke Istanbul untuk bertemu dengan teman lelaki kesayangannya, namun gadis yang naif itu tidak tahu apa yang akan berlaku kepada kehidupannya di sana.(n)

programme.title: Matahari Tak Bercahaya
programme.desc: Telefilem ini mengisahkan Mastura, seorang penjaga taska dan isteri kepada Shazan yang menjalani hidup bahagia di kampung. Namun semuanya berubah selepas satu insiden ketika menerima rawatan di hospital menyebabkan Mastura dijangkiti HIV secara tidak sengaja, lalu hidupnya berubah dari disenangi menjadi dibenci masyarakat kampung.(n)

programme.title: Kasut Ku Kusut
programme.desc: Kasut Ku Kusut mengisahkan seorang pemuda kampung bernama Manap yang berasa kecewa kerana kasut barunya telah hilang. Sementara itu, Markos, ahli kumpulan gangster Father Dragon, ditugaskan untuk membawa Suzi kepada ketua geng. Dalam perjalanan, mereka tersesat di sebuah kampung, dan Suzi berjaya melarikan diri lalu bertemu dengan Manap yang masih mencari kasutnya. Ketika Markos menemui mereka, Manap menyedari bahawa kasut yang dipakai oleh Markos kelihatan sangat mirip dengan kasutnya yang hilang.(n)

programme.title: Kaki Kitai
programme.desc: Din AKA Drango dan Ayoi adalah dua sahabat yang juga merupakan penipu. Mereka berdua datang ke Kuala Lumpur dan secara tidak sengaja bertemu semula dengan seorang kawan lama yang kini bekerja sebagai pegawai polis. Namun, hidup mereka mula berubah apabila mereka menemui sebuah beg sampah yang dipenuhi dengan wang tunai, yang kemudian mereka gunakan untuk membayar hutang.(n)

programme.title: Ruang Temu
programme.desc: Program temu bual bersama Tony Eusoff yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi beliau berkaitan pengalaman beliau di dalam industri seni.(n)

programme.title: 6 Jilake
programme.desc: Sekumpulan samseng upahan yang dikenali sebagai “6 Jilake” ditugaskan oleh syarikat penjajah untuk menguasai lombong bijih timah di negeri Perak pada abad ke-18. Namun mereka berhadapan dengan seorang pendekar kampung yang hebat dan sukar dikalahkan, lalu tercetus konflik besar penuh aksi dan jenaka.(n)

programme.title: Ruang Temu
programme.desc: Program temu bual bersama Tony Eusoff yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi beliau berkaitan pengalaman beliau di dalam industri seni.(n)

programme.title: Syahadah Terakhir
programme.desc: Telefilem ini mengisahkan tentang Pak Yusuf yang amat menyayangi anak-anaknya, Razlan dan Rafidah, tetapi selepas kematian isterinya, dia mula menumpang di rumah anak-anaknya dan sikapnya yang cerewet serta kerap membanding-bandingkan harta menyebabkan konflik keluarga. Rafidah menjadi tersepit antara suaminya Zaidi dan tekanan dari bapanya.(n)

programme.title: One, Two, Trivia
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang merungkai fakta-fakta menarik yang tersimpan dalam filem-filem klasik tempatan.(n)

programme.title: Mat Tudung
programme.desc: Johari, seorang bekas playboy dan Mat Rempit, jatuh hati pada gadis sopan bernama Zizie yang hanya menyukai lelaki berakhlak baik. Untuk menambat hati Zizie, Johari menyamar sebagai “adiknya” Johanna, lalu tercetus pelbagai situasi lucu dan kecoh.(n)

programme.title: Lukisan Hati Umar
programme.desc: Umar, seorang budak yang berbakat melukis dan berteman dengan seekor beruk, hidup susah selepas kematian ibunya. Dia terpaksa bekerja memetik kelapa untuk menyara diri, tetapi hasilnya sering dirampas oleh bapa tirinya yang kasar. Cerita ini berkisar cabaran hidup Umar dan usahanya terus bertahan serta mencari harapan dalam kesusahan.(n)

programme.title: Gol & Gincu 2
programme.desc: Sekuel kepada Gol & Gincu yang mengikuti kehidupan Putri dan rakan-rakannya selepas beberapa tahun. Mereka menghadapi cabaran baharu dalam kerjaya, cinta dan persahabatan, sambil cuba mengekalkan hubungan rapat yang telah lama terjalin.(n)

programme.title: My Dream My Wish
programme.desc: Kisah tentang perjalanan hidup dan hubungan cinta yang diuji oleh takdir, di mana watak utama berdepan cabaran emosi, kehilangan, dan usaha untuk mengejar impian mereka dalam hidup.(n)

programme.title: Reaksiar
programme.desc: Program yang memaparkan perkongsian pengalaman dan reaksi artis-artis jemputan setelah melihat kembali klip-klip lakonan mereka.(n)

programme.title: Hantu Tok Mudim
programme.desc: Sekumpulan lelaki muda cuba menakutkan penduduk kampung dengan cerita hantu Tok Mudim untuk mengaut keuntungan, tapi akhirnya mereka sendiri terjerat dalam situasi lucu.(n)

programme.title: 3 Dara Pinggiran
programme.desc: 3 Dara Pinggiran mengisahkan tiga wanita dari latar hidup berbeza yang bergelut dengan cabaran hidup, cinta dan keluarga. Walaupun sering berdepan masalah dan salah faham, mereka saling menyokong antara satu sama lain dalam mencari kebahagiaan dan arah hidup masing-masing.(n)

Ketika Markos menemui mereka, Manap menyedari bahawa kasut yang dipakai oleh Markos kelihatan sangat mirip dengan kasutnya yang hilang.(n)

programme.title: Kaki Kitai
programme.desc: Din AKA Drango dan Ayoi adalah dua sahabat yang juga merupakan penipu. Namun, hidup mereka mula berubah apabila mereka menemui sebuah beg sampah yang dipenuhi dengan wang tunai, yang kemudian mereka gunakan untuk membayar hutang.(n)

programme.title: Adnan Sempit 2
programme.desc: Adnan, seorang penunggang motosikal jalanan yatim piatu yang dijaga oleh ibu saudaranya. Sebaliknya, Nadia dilahirkan dalam keluarga kaya dan kini memiliki pekerjaan yang stabil. Kedua-dua insan yang berbeza ini bertemu secara kebetulan dan akhirnya menjalin hubungan. Kini, dalam "Adnan Sempit 2", Shaheizy Sam kembali memegang watak sebagai Adnan, mengisahkan cabaran dan dugaan dalam kehidupannya serta hubungannya dengan Nadia.(n)

programme.title: Adnan Sempit 3
programme.desc: NADIA dan WAWA disahkan mengandung! ADNAN gembira kerana akhirnya dia bakal menjadi seorang bapa. Dia bersedia untuk menjaga NADIA, tetapi sebaliknya, dia yang mengalami alahan pagi dan pelbagai gejala kehamilan. Sementara itu, WAWA dan BOBBY menjalani kehidupan yang sederhana dan menghadapi masalah kewangan. WAWA mula marah kepada BOBBY kerana mereka tidak mempunyai cukup wang semasa tempoh kehamilannya dan menjelang kelahiran. Sebagai seorang kawan yang baik, ADNAN meminjamkan wang kepada BOBBY. Namun, BOBBY tidak lagi berani meminta wang daripada ADNAN selepas dimarahi olehnya yang tertekan dengan keadaan NADIA. Akibat desakan hidup, BOBBY membuat keputusan untuk berlumba semula.(n)

programme.title: Ruang Temu
programme.desc: Program temu bual bersama Tony Eusoff yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi beliau berkaitan pengalaman beliau di dalam industri seni.(n)

programme.title: Dari Hatiku ke Hatimu
programme.desc: Telefilem ini mengisahkan tentang Ayla Yanira, seorang gadis dari Pulau Langkawi yang membenci lelaki, terutama dari Kuala Lumpur, selepas mengalami putus cinta akibat jarak yang jauh. Kisah hidupnya berubah apabila Zaid Hidayat, seorang jejaka dari Kuala Lumpur, muncul dan perlahan-lahan membuka kembali pintu hati Ayla yang lama terkunci.(n)

programme.title: My Dream My Wish

Namun semuanya berubah selepas satu insiden ketika menerima rawatan di hospital menyebabkan Mastura dijangkiti HIV secara tidak sengaja, lalu hidupnya berubah dari disenangi menjadi dibenci masyarakat kampung.(n)

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Dua ejen FBI, Kevin dan Marcus, menyamar sebagai sosialita putih kaya selepas satu kes diculik. Mereka cuba selesaikan kes sambil menavigasi dunia fesyen dan gosip tinggi, dengan banyak situasi lucu dan kekeliruan identiti.(n)

programme.title: Syawal Mencari Cinta
programme.desc: Pada pagi Raya, Syawal melepak bersama rakannya dan mereka tidak menunaikan solat sunat Hari Raya. Setelah selesai solat sunat Hari Raya, dia ternampak seorang gadis yang tidak pernah dilihatnya di kampung sebelum ini. Syawal terus berkesimpulan bahawa dia telah menemui cinta sejati. Dia telah mengunjung setiap rumah di kampung untuk menjejaki gadis tersebut. Selepas sekian lama mencari tanpa membuahkan hasil, Syawal terus mengumumkan kepada seluruh kampung bahawa dia akan melaksanakan rumah terbuka untuk hari raya dan semua orang dijemput hadir ke rumahnya. Namun demikian, setelah selesai rumah terbukanya, gadis yang dicari-cari Syawal masih tidak kelihatan. Dia kecewa lalu berputus asa. Tanpa sedar, gadis yang dijejaki selama ini adalah Cinta, sepupunya sendiri.(n)

programme.title: Adnan Sempit 2
programme.desc: Adnan, seorang penunggang motosikal jalanan yatim piatu yang dijaga oleh ibu saudaranya. Sebaliknya, Nadia dilahirkan dalam keluarga kaya dan kini memiliki pekerjaan yang stabil. Kedua-dua insan yang berbeza ini bertemu secara kebetulan dan akhirnya menjalin hubungan. programme.title: Ruang Temu
programme.desc: Program temu bual bersama Tony Eusoff yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi beliau berkaitan pengalaman beliau di dalam industri seni.(n)

programme.title: Syahadah Terakhir
programme.desc: Telefilem ini mengisahkan tentang Pak Yusuf yang amat menyayangi anak-anaknya, Razlan dan Rafidah, tetapi selepas kematian isterinya, dia mula menumpang di rumah anak-anaknya dan sikapnya yang cerewet serta kerap membanding-bandingkan harta menyebabkan konflik keluarga. Rafidah menjadi tersepit antara suaminya Zaidi dan tekanan dari bapanya.(n)

programme.title: Siapakah Perempuan Yang Aku Nikahi?
programme.desc: Akbar (Zidni Hakim) berusaha mencari keberadaan Risma (Larassati Kusnanda). Risma pula berangkat ke Jakarta untuk mencari Akbar, ditemani oleh Tina (Disha Devina). Namun, dalam perjalanan menaiki van mini, mereka terlibat dalam satu kemalangan yang menyebabkan Risma hilang ingatan. Menyedari bahawa Akbar seorang jutawan, Tina mengambil kesempatan dengan menyamar sebagai Risma dan akhirnya berkahwin dengannya. Namun, lama-kelamaan Akbar mula merasakan sesuatu yang tidak kena dengan 'Risma' yang kini menjadi isterinya.(n)

programme.title: Cinta Sedalam Rindu
programme.desc: Aluna menyangka takdirnya hanyalah sebagai anak kepada seorang pembantu rumah yang terpaksa mengorbankan cintanya demi Felicia, anak majikannya. Namun, apabila rahsia dari masa lalunya terbongkar, seluruh hidup mereka berubah sama sekali.(n)

programme.title: Di Antara Dua Cinta
programme.desc: Pada hari ulang tahun perkahwinan Shafira dan Rafael yang ke-2, Shafira dikejutkan dengan berita bahawa Rafael telah terlibat dalam satu kemalangan, dan jasadnya tidak ditemui. Beberapa tahun berlalu, Rafael akhirnya disahkan meninggal dunia. Shafira kemudian membuat keputusan untuk berkahwin semula dengan Julian. Namun, di puncak kebahagiaan perkahwinan mereka, Rafael tiba-tiba muncul kembali.(n)

programme.title: Di Antara Dua Cinta
programme.desc: Pada hari ulang tahun perkahwinan Shafira dan Rafael yang ke-2, Shafira dikejutkan dengan berita bahawa Rafael telah terlibat dalam satu kemalangan, dan jasadnya tidak ditemui. Beberapa tahun berlalu, Rafael akhirnya disahkan meninggal dunia. Shafira kemudian membuat keputusan untuk berkahwin semula dengan Julian. Namun, di puncak kebahagiaan perkahwinan mereka, Rafael tiba-tiba muncul kembali.(n)

programme.title: Wanita Istimewa
programme.desc: Mirsa (Alisia Rininta) dan Radit (Reuben Elishama) hidup sederhana di Padang sehingga satu kesilapan besar berlaku apabila Radit tanpa sedar membawa beg berisi dadah. Untuk melindungi suaminya, Mirsa menyerah diri dan dipenjara selama tujuh tahun, manakala bayi yang dilahirkannya terpaksa diserahkan kepada ibu mertuanya untuk dijaga. Selepas dibebaskan, Mirsa mencari keluarganya tetapi mendapati Radit sudah berpindah ke Jakarta. Jejak itu membawa Mirsa ke sebuah acara pelancaran perumahan di mana dia bertemu semula dengan Radit yang kini bersama isterinya Karina (Naomi Zaskia) dan berkenalan dengan Reza (Randy Pangalila), sementara tekanan daripada Pramana (Adipura) terhadap perkahwinan mereka mula terbongkar.(n)

programme.title: D'Academy Asia 6
programme.desc: D'Academy Asia dengan slogan "Suara Sejati Asia" adalah pertandingan menyanyi dangdut tingkat Asia. Negara berikutnya yang akan bergabung dalam DA Asia 6 adalah Türkiye! Bersiaplah menjadi bintang dangdut terbesar di Asia!(n)

programme.title: Salingka Bumi Minang
programme.desc: Dokumentari separa realiti yang meneroka Minang, sebuah wilayah di Indonesia yang terkenal sebagai Tanah Para Pedagang.(n)

programme.title: Siapakah Perempuan Yang Aku Nikahi?
programme.desc: Akbar (Zidni Hakim) berusaha mencari keberadaan Risma (Larassati Kusnanda). Risma pula berangkat ke Jakarta untuk mencari Akbar, ditemani oleh Tina (Disha Devina). programme.title: D'Academy 7 Mega Konser: Sosial Media Awards
programme.desc: D'Academy 7 Social Media Awards meraikan para penghibur dan bakat D'Academy 7 yang telah mencipta fenomena serta menjadikan program ini antara rancangan hiburan paling popular di Indonesia.(n)

programme.title: Cinta Sedalam Rindu
programme.desc: Aluna menyangka takdirnya hanyalah sebagai anak kepada seorang pembantu rumah yang terpaksa mengorbankan cintanya demi Felicia, anak majikannya. Namun, apabila rahsia dari masa lalunya terbongkar, seluruh hidup mereka berubah sama sekali.(n)

Untuk melindungi suaminya, Mirsa menyerah diri dan dipenjara selama tujuh tahun, manakala bayi yang dilahirkannya terpaksa diserahkan kepada ibu mertuanya untuk dijaga. programme.title: Resepsi Kita Disponsori Pawang Hujan
programme.desc: Rara sanggup berpura-pura menjadi pawang hujan demi melangsaikan hutang dan menampung kos rawatan bapanya. Namun tanpa diduga, dia bertemu Angga, pemilik syarikat perancang perkahwinan yang tidak percaya pada perkara mistik. Hubungan mereka semakin rapat hingga timbul rasa cinta, tetapi keadaan menjadi rumit apabila Angga mengetahui penipuan Rara lalu melaporkannya kepada pihak polis. Walau bagaimanapun, kisah mereka akhirnya berakhir dengan bahagia.(n)

programme.title: D'Academy 7 Mega Konser: Sosial Media Awards
programme.desc: D'Academy 7 Social Media Awards meraikan para penghibur dan bakat D'Academy 7 yang telah mencipta fenomena serta menjadikan program ini antara rancangan hiburan paling popular di Indonesia.(n)

programme.title: Wanita Istimewa
programme.desc: Mirsa (Alisia Rininta) dan Radit (Reuben Elishama) hidup sederhana di Padang sehingga satu kesilapan besar berlaku apabila Radit tanpa sedar membawa beg berisi dadah. Untuk melindungi suaminya, Mirsa menyerah diri dan dipenjara selama tujuh tahun, manakala bayi yang dilahirkannya terpaksa diserahkan kepada ibu mertuanya untuk dijaga. Selepas dibebaskan, Mirsa mencari keluarganya tetapi mendapati Radit sudah berpindah ke Jakarta. Jejak itu membawa Mirsa ke sebuah acara pelancaran perumahan di mana dia bertemu semula dengan Radit yang kini bersama isterinya Karina (Naomi Zaskia) dan berkenalan dengan Reza (Randy Pangalila), sementara tekanan daripada Pramana (Adipura) terhadap perkahwinan mereka mula terbongkar.(n)

programme.title: Suster El
programme.desc: Kisah seorang gadis yatim piatu bernama Elnara yang tinggal bersama kakaknya, Resti. Demi memenuhi impian Nara untuk menjadi jururawat, Resti bekerja keras. Hingga suatu hari, Resti bertemu dengan seorang lelaki kaya bernama Verdi dan mereka akhirnya menikah. Nara sangat gembira kerana perkahwinan Resti membawa kehidupan yang lebih baik untuk mereka, tetapi kegembiraan Nara berakhir seketika apabila dia menemui sesuatu yang menggoncangkan dunianya dan mengancam untuk memisahkan keluarganya.(n)

programme.title: Resepsi Kita Disponsori Pawang Hujan
programme.desc: Rara sanggup berpura-pura menjadi pawang hujan demi melangsaikan hutang dan menampung kos rawatan bapanya. Namun tanpa diduga, dia bertemu Angga, pemilik syarikat perancang perkahwinan yang tidak percaya pada perkara mistik. Hubungan mereka semakin rapat hingga timbul rasa cinta, tetapi keadaan menjadi rumit apabila Angga mengetahui penipuan Rara lalu melaporkannya kepada pihak polis. Walau bagaimanapun, kisah mereka akhirnya berakhir dengan bahagia.(n)

programme.title: Cinta Sedalam Rindu
programme.desc: Aluna menyangka takdirnya hanyalah sebagai anak kepada seorang pembantu rumah yang terpaksa mengorbankan cintanya demi Felicia, anak majikannya. Namun, apabila rahsia dari masa lalunya terbongkar, seluruh hidup mereka berubah sama sekali.(n)

programme.title: Di Antara Dua Cinta
programme.desc: Pada hari ulang tahun perkahwinan Shafira dan Rafael yang ke-2, Shafira dikejutkan dengan berita bahawa Rafael telah terlibat dalam satu kemalangan, dan jasadnya tidak ditemui. Beberapa tahun berlalu, Rafael akhirnya disahkan meninggal dunia. Shafira kemudian membuat keputusan untuk berkahwin semula dengan Julian. Namun, di puncak kebahagiaan perkahwinan mereka, Rafael tiba-tiba muncul kembali.(n)

programme.title: Di Antara Dua Cinta
programme.desc: Pada hari ulang tahun perkahwinan Shafira dan Rafael yang ke-2, Shafira dikejutkan dengan berita bahawa Rafael telah terlibat dalam satu kemalangan, dan jasadnya tidak ditemui. programme.title: D'Academy Asia 6
programme.desc: D'Academy Asia dengan slogan "Suara Sejati Asia" adalah pertandingan menyanyi dangdut tingkat Asia. Negara berikutnya yang akan bergabung dalam DA Asia 6 adalah Türkiye! Bersiaplah menjadi bintang dangdut terbesar di Asia!(n)

programme.title: Salingka Bumi Minang
programme.desc: Dokumentari separa realiti yang meneroka Minang, sebuah wilayah di Indonesia yang terkenal sebagai Tanah Para Pedagang.(n)

programme.title: Resepsi Kita Disponsori Pawang Hujan
programme.desc: Rara sanggup berpura-pura menjadi pawang hujan demi melangsaikan hutang dan menampung kos rawatan bapanya. programme.title: D'Academy 7 Mega Konser: Sosial Media Awards
programme.desc: D'Academy 7 Social Media Awards meraikan para penghibur dan bakat D'Academy 7 yang telah mencipta fenomena serta menjadikan program ini antara rancangan hiburan paling popular di Indonesia.(n)

programme.title: Saleha
programme.desc: Saleha mengisahkan seorang gadis baik hati yang ditinggalkan oleh ayahnya dan dibesarkan oleh nenek. Selepas diculik dan kehilangan neneknya, dia dipersalahkan dan dihalau oleh keluarganya. Dengan semangat dan keimanan yang teguh, Saleha memulakan hidup baru di Jakarta sambil menyembunyikan penyakit serius.(n)

programme.title: Makan Terooos
programme.desc: Jelajahi kekayaan masakan yang menampilkan rasa autentik. Sertai kami dalam pengembaraan rasa di seluruh Indonesia, hanya di Makan Terooos, di mana setiap hidangan memiliki kisahnya sendiri.(n)

programme.title: Wanita Istimewa
programme.desc: Mirsa (Alisia Rininta) dan Radit (Reuben Elishama) hidup sederhana di Padang sehingga satu kesilapan besar berlaku apabila Radit tanpa sedar membawa beg berisi dadah. programme.title: Dua Hati Sarangheyo To SarangBeo
programme.desc: Keni (Fendy Chow) dipaksa menyamar sebagai idola Korea demi menyelamatkan acara 'meet and greet' yang dianjurkan oleh Erika. Dengan berat hati, Keni akhirnya bersetuju dengan permintaan tersebut.(n)

programme.title: Konser Luar Biasa Vol. 2 - Princess Dangdut Jaman Now
programme.desc: Saksikan kemeriahan Konser Luar Biasa Vol. 2 - Princess Dangdut Jaman Now, menampilkan barisan bintang dangdut hebat dalam persembahan yang penuh tenaga dan kejutan.(n)

programme.title: Saleha
programme.desc: Saleha mengisahkan seorang gadis baik hati yang ditinggalkan oleh ayahnya dan dibesarkan oleh nenek. programme.title: Siapakah Perempuan Yang Aku Nikahi?
programme.desc: Akbar (Zidni Hakim) berusaha mencari keberadaan Risma (Larassati Kusnanda). Risma pula berangkat ke Jakarta untuk mencari Akbar, ditemani oleh Tina (Disha Devina). Namun, dalam perjalanan menaiki van mini, mereka terlibat dalam satu kemalangan yang menyebabkan Risma hilang ingatan. Menyedari bahawa Akbar seorang jutawan, Tina mengambil kesempatan dengan menyamar sebagai Risma dan akhirnya berkahwin dengannya. Namun, lama-kelamaan Akbar mula merasakan sesuatu yang tidak kena dengan 'Risma' yang kini menjadi isterinya.(n)

programme.title: Salingka Bumi Minang
programme.desc: Dokumentari separa realiti yang meneroka Minang, sebuah wilayah di Indonesia yang terkenal sebagai Tanah Para Pedagang.(n)

programme.title: Karnaval SCTV 2024
programme.desc: Karnaval SCTV merupakan sebuah rancangan varieti yang disiarkan di SCTV dan datang ke bandar anda. Ia dimeriahkan oleh para pelakon sinetron SCTV serta pemuzik tanah air. Karnaval SCTV kali ini hadir di Madiun dengan tetamu istimewa yang mengejutkan.(n)

programme.title: Pelangi Untuk Nirmala
programme.desc: Persahabatan antara dua orang gadis, Pelangi dan Nirmala. Namun, persahabatan mereka ditentang oleh orang tua mereka kerana perbezaan strata sosial. Pelangi hidup dengan sederhana, sementara Nirmala hidup mewah.(n)

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta
programme.desc: Starla menyangka dia telah menghadapi segalanya, tetapi penipuan Niko jauh lebih mendalam daripada yang disangkanya. Ketika dia terus berusaha mempertahankan perkahwinannya, ancaman baharu muncul. Ayu, yang masih taksub dengan Niko, semakin mengikatnya dalam perangkap dengan menggunakan anak mereka yang belum lahir sebagai umpan. Pada masa yang sama, naluri Starla merasakan ada sesuatu yang tidak kena, dan dia mula diburu oleh bayang-bayang serta rahsia gelap. Dengan keluarganya di ambang bahaya dan emosinya semakin tertekan, adakah Starla mampu melindungi orang-orang tersayang? Atau adakah pengkhianatan Niko akan mendorongnya melangkaui batas yang tidak boleh kembali?(n)

programme.title: Indonesia Pintar
programme.desc: Rancangan permainan terbesar di Indonesia yang mempertandingkan kecerdasan dan kecekapan 100 pelajar sekolah. Program ini diisi dengan pelbagai permainan menarik dan hadiah keseluruhan bernilai jutaan rupiah.(n)

programme.title: Mencintaimu Sama Dengan Horor
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan teman wanitanya akibat salah faham, Brian cuba melupakan kisah lamanya. Tanpa diduga, dia bertemu dengan Dea di hospital dan diam-diam terpikat dengan pesona pemandu ambulans cantik itu. Namun, perjuangan Brian untuk memenangi hati Dea bukanlah sesuatu yang mudah.(n)

programme.title: Foodie Buddy
programme.desc: Program masakan dan kulinari yang meneroka keunikan serta kekayaan cita rasa hidangan Indonesia, menampilkan pelbagai sajian tradisional, ramuan tempatan dan pengalaman kulinari dari seluruh negara.(n)

programme.title: Rindu Bukan Rindu
programme.desc: Rindu Bukan Rindu mengisahkan kisah seorang wanita bernama Rindu yang merasa bertuah memiliki seorang lelaki bernama Devan. Kedua-duanya tinggal di Jepun dan menghabiskan masa bersama. Devan sentiasa berada di dekat Rindu, melindungi dan mencintainya. Hubungan di antara mereka terasa sangat rapat dan sempurna. Tetapi suatu hari, Rindu melihat Devan memegang tangan seorang wanita lain. Apakah yang terjadi di antara mereka?(n)

programme.title: Saleha
programme.desc: Saleha mengisahkan seorang gadis baik hati yang ditinggalkan oleh ayahnya dan dibesarkan oleh nenek. programme.title: Karnaval SCTV 33
programme.desc: Setiap tahun, karnival SCTV mempunyai tema yang berbeza. Karnival ini menyajikan acara muzik yang paling menarik dan menampilkan ramai musikus serta selebriti terkemuka tanah air.(n)

programme.title: Pelangi Untuk Nirmala
programme.desc: Persahabatan antara dua orang gadis, Pelangi dan Nirmala. Namun, persahabatan mereka ditentang oleh orang tua mereka kerana perbezaan strata sosial. Pelangi hidup dengan sederhana, sementara Nirmala hidup mewah.(n)

programme.title: CANOLA
programme.desc: Gye-choon and her lost granddaughter Hye-ji reunited after 12 years, yet Hye-ji's strange behavior raise questions on what happened to her while they were apart.(n)

programme.title: WHERE WOULD YOU LIKE TO GO?
programme.desc: A schoolteacher, Do-Kyung dies as he fails to save his student Ji-Yong from drowning. His wife Myung-Ji travels to Warsaw to stay away from the reality and meets an old friend.(n)

programme.title: A MILLIONAIRE'S FIRST LOVE
programme.desc: To inherit his grandfather's fortune, Jae-kyung has to transfer to a school in the countryside. He fell in love with a pretty girl Eun-hwan and is going to know about her secrets...(n)

programme.title: THE NIGHT OWL
programme.desc: A blind acupuncturist, who strangely can see normally at night, happens to witness the death of the crown prince.(n)

programme.title: HIJACK 1971
programme.desc: The detonation of an explosive device causes terror on the flight, and pilot Gyu-Sik loses sight in one eye. Yong-dae, who hatched the hijacking plot, threatens to take the plane to North Korea.(n)

programme.title: HONEST CANDIDATE 2
programme.desc: Joo Sang-sook, who failed to win the Seoul mayoral election by dropping the truth bomb on national television, is suddenly pulled into the spotlight again after rescuing a young man from drowning.(n)

programme.title: I DON'T FIRE MYSELF
programme.desc: Being discriminated as a woman, Jeong-eun was dispatched and given great pressure to resign, but she is not willing to simply give up...(n)

programme.title: SPIRITWALKER
programme.desc: A man loses memory and wakes up in a new body every 12 hours. In search of his identity, he met a woman who claims to know him.(n)

programme.title: MY WORST NEIGHBOR
programme.desc: In a house with little soundproofing, a man and a woman living next door started a noise war. They then cohabitate through the wall, and catching up in subtle emotions...(n)

programme.title: DEADMAN
programme.desc: An ace in the barge business makes money by selling his name, is falsely accused of embezzling billions. He fights to reclaim his stolen life from those tied to him solely by name.(n)

programme.title: FOLLOWING
programme.desc: Real estate agent Jung-Tae has a penchant for spying. He discovers the death of the social media star So-Ra. He is falsely accused of murder and is determined to find the real culprit.(n)

programme.title: NEW WORLD
programme.desc: An undercover cop spends eight years to infiltrate South Korea's largest crime organization. When the head of the organization is killed, he becomes torn between his loyalties.(n)

programme.title: THE WITCH: PART 2. THE OTHER ONE
programme.desc: A mysterious girl survived a blood raid in a secret lab found herself being tracked down by a group of assassins.(n)

programme.title: THE SNITCH
programme.desc: Kang-soo was falsely accused and imprisoned. A prosecutor offered him a deal to be a snitch in exchange for a reduced sentence and Kang-soo starts to shake up the drug investigation...(n)

programme.title: THE OLD WOMAN WITH THE KNIFE
programme.desc: A legendary assassin named Hornclaw is now aging. She faces declining health while mentoring a reckless apprentice, Bullfight, and confronting a deadly rival obsessed with her.(n)

programme.title: CONFESSION (2022)
programme.desc: A man who became a suspect in a closed-door murder seeks help from an attorney to prove him innocent. As they begin to piece the puzzle together, the truth slowly reverses.(n)

programme.title: ON THE LINE
programme.desc: Voice phishing victim infiltrates into the organisation's call center to recover the money, yet discovered another large scale scam ahead...(n)

programme.title: LIFE IS BEAUTIFUL
programme.desc: Se-yeon, devoted her entire life to her family, suddenly learns she is gravely ill. Now she is determined to live for herself more than ever and looks for her first love with the help of her husband.(n)

programme.title: MY WORST NEIGHBOR
programme.desc: In a house with little soundproofing, a man and a woman living next door started a noise war. They then cohabitate through the wall, and catching up in subtle emotions...(n)

programme.title: USURY ACADEMY
programme.desc: Kang-jin is bullied as the lowest-ranking boy at school with no presence and money. He starts a business on private loans by chance and soon rises to the top of the school hierarchy.(n)

programme.title: THE KILLER
programme.desc: Ui-gang, a retired hitman, reluctantly agrees to take care of a teen-aged girl Yoon-ji, but when she becomes involved with unsavory people, he shows up to rescue her and take her home.(n)

programme.title: DR. CHEON AND THE LOST TALISMAN
programme.desc: Dr. Cheon is a fake exorcist who cannot see or hear any ghosts. One day, a woman comes to Dr. Cheon, asking him to save her possessed younger sister.(n)

programme.title: FIST & FURIOUS
programme.desc: A former detective grants permission to a freelance video journalist to cover his revenge journey on a mob boss whom previously killed his partner during an investigation.(n)

programme.title: THE ROUNDUP: PUNISHMENT
programme.desc: Ma Seok-Do investigates a drug-trafficking app, uncovers a link to an illegal organization. As Baek Chang-Gi terrorizes the gambling market, an alliance is formed to stop the threat.(n)

programme.title: DITTO
programme.desc: A voice from the future echoes through an antique radio connects the two living 20 years apart and changed Yong's life forever.(n)

programme.title: ONCE AGAIN
programme.desc: Woo-seok in his 40's has always dreamt of going back to his high school days when he had the best days of his life. After an accident, he wakes up and finds himself in the year 1997...(n)

programme.title: IL MARE
programme.desc: A young woman from 1999 and a young man from 1997 begin a parallel-time love story separated by a span of two years when they start to receive each other's letters in the mailbox.(n)

programme.title: NEW WORLD
programme.desc: An undercover cop spends eight years to infiltrate South Korea's largest crime organization. When the head of the organization is killed, he becomes torn between his loyalties.(n)

programme.title: SECRET: UNTOLD MELODY
programme.desc: Yu-jun, an injured pianist, meets Jung-a in a college practice room, and they develop feelings for each other. He searches for her after she vanishes one day and discovers her secret.(n)

programme.title: aespa: WORLD TOUR in cinemas
programme.desc: Witness aespa's first world tour with futuristic stage visuals, high-energy choreography and captivating vocals. Exclusive behind-the-scenes interviews offer a glimpse behind the curtain.(n)

programme.title: ONCE AGAIN
programme.desc: Woo-seok in his 40's has always dreamt of going back to his high school days when he had the best days of his life. After an accident, he wakes up and finds himself in the year 1997...(n)

programme.title: HEAR ME: OUR SUMMER
programme.desc: Yong-jun is working as a delivery man when he meets and instantly falls for Yeo-reum, the devoted sister of a gifted deaf swimmer. Yeo-reum slowly opens her heart to warm-hearted Yong-jun.(n)

programme.title: FOLLOWING
programme.desc: Real estate agent Jung-Tae has a penchant for spying. He discovers the death of the social media star So-Ra. He is falsely accused of murder and is determined to find the real culprit.(n)

programme.title: DEADMAN
programme.desc: An ace in the barge business makes money by selling his name, is falsely accused of embezzling billions. He fights to reclaim his stolen life from those tied to him solely by name.(n)

programme.title: ONCE WE WERE US
programme.desc: Former lovers Eun-ho and Jeong-won unexpectedly reunite on a flight to Korea, giving them a second chance to reminisce about their past and share long-buried words with each other.(n)

programme.title: LOVE RESET
programme.desc: A couple decide to divorce after two years of marriage. They revive a 30-day divorce settlement period from the court, but then they both lost memories after a car accident...(n)

programme.title: CONFESSION (2022)
programme.desc: A man who became a suspect in a closed-door murder seeks help from an attorney to prove him innocent. As they begin to piece the puzzle together, the truth slowly reverses.(n)

programme.title: STREAMING
programme.desc: Top crime channel streamer Woo Sang goes live to catch a serial killer and reclaim fame—until he learns the killer is watching, turning his hunt into a deadly game.(n)

programme.title: I, THE EXECUTIONER
programme.desc: Detective Seo Do-Cheol and rookie cop Park Sun-Woo investigate a murder which reveals links to past cases of a serial killer. The killer releases a teaser online and intensifies the chaos.(n)

programme.title: SPIRITWALKER
programme.desc: A man loses memory and wakes up in a new body every 12 hours. In search of his identity, he met a woman who claims to know him.(n)

programme.title: World of Street Woman Fighter
programme.desc: The Street Woman Fighter series make a triumphant return on a global stage! 6 dance crews from different countries set to compete in an upgraded match to win the title of International Champion!(n)

programme.desc: Ryu Soo-young, Yoon Kyung-ho and Kihyun set out into the unknown for new recipes, cooking up one-of-a-kind dishes along the way.(n)

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.(n)

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong and Global View
programme.desc: Report important news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs.(n)

programme.title: EMISSARY
programme.desc: Jiang Dawei is an idealistic college student who joins the police force. He undergoes training at a law school and eventually becomes a police officer, surrounded by a diverse group of officers with varying personalities and backgrounds. Given the lawlessness of drug lords, Jiang Dawei accepts a secret order from his superior to orchestrate a frame-up and become an undercover detective, working as a trusted aide to a drug kingpin. He feigns compliance while secretly gathering evidence of the kingpin's crimes. Undercover, Jiang Dawei's personality drastically changes, and he faces misunderstanding from his father, relatives, and girlfriend, Wang Jiaqi. With no recourse, he vividly portrays the hardships of being a police officer.(n)

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: HUNG SHU-KAN (Lau Dan) built his own logistics business from scratch and now everything is in order. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, HUNG YUEK-SHUI (Koni Lui), is still single. She and her little prodigy sister, HUNG SUM-YUE (Andrea So), often fight over small things, putting their father in dilemmas.(n)

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: The brand-new children's program “Hands Up” encourages kids to ask questions bravely, express themselves, and pursue their goals! Members of the mascot “Sauce Family” join the hosts in performing short skits, accompanying everyone for joyful moments. The show will also feature a variety of children's songs, allowing kids to sing along while learning practical life knowledge.(n)

programme.title: Journey to Jianghu (SR.2) & What's On Today
programme.desc: As the saying goes, "Reading ten thousand books is not as good as traveling ten thousand miles." Wayne Lai and Mak Cheung-ching embark on another journey, continuing their exploration of the magnificent landscapes depicted in Jin Yong's novels and delving into the martial arts world of Chinese history. They travel along the Yangtze and Yellow River basins, traversing Sichuan, Zhejiang, Henan, and Shanxi provinces, climbing Mount Emei's Golden Summit, visiting Baidi City, the Yue Fei Temple in Zhuxian Town, and exploring the Shaolin Temple on Mount Song. They experienced the weight of historical sites and savored local delicacies. The martial arts world is not only a stage for swords and shadows, but also a realm of intertwined human relationships. During their journey, they also reunited with Michelle Yim, Benny Chan, Louis Fan, and Jackie Lui, reminiscing about their past collaborations and laughing about bygone days.(n)

programme.title: The Joy Of Nature
programme.desc: Taiwan's camping destinations are breathtaking! Hong Kong host Lin Yinghui, along with three of Taiwan's goddesses Lin Xiang, Zhang Yahan, and Huang Shangyan, embarked on a nature-themed healing trip. They traversed Nantou, Kaohsiung, Taoyuan, and other locations, delving into the Miaoli mountains, trying out forest cabins, luxury campervans, deluxe tents, and even camping at a baseball stadium… Surrounded by mountains, they enjoyed open-air hot springs, watched the sunset at the beach, explored historical sites near the campsites, and immersed themselves in nature. Finally, they returned to Yangmingshan in Taipei for camping, soaking in hot springs, and overlooking the unparalleled night view of Taipei! Besides experiencing the unique atmosphere of camping, what sparks will fly between the Taiwanese and Hong Kong women as they interact and bond?(n)

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Human desires can drive us to transform ourselves. However, when desires get out of line due to pure greed for money and power, or even fanciful lust, so much so that whimsical imaginings are infinitely exaggerated. And unintentionally, you just fall into the abyss of moral dilemma and commit all kinds of Deadly Sins. Crime Unit, New Territories East investigates successive cases, including Faceless Corpse, Stone Coffin, $100 Million Motive for Murder, Dangerous Game, Dirty Bullet and Terrifying Lover. Perplexing clues and tangled relationships become the foundation of a series of unbelievable mysteries, revealing the baffling dark side of human nature.(n)

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.(n)

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: " Big Boys Club" is a youth talk show hosted by a group of close friends—Bob Lam, Oscar Leung, Derek Wong, Philip Fan, and Alan Chan. In each episode, singers, entertainers, or guests from various fields are invited for relaxed interviews, presenting a wide range of topics including current social issues, pop culture, and trending interests. Matters of love, relationships, and even same-sex relationships are endlessly discussed topics for men and women alike. The show invites guests from diverse backgrounds to explore love and relationships, delving into the dynamics between the sexes. The "Other Dimension" segment features guests sharing extraordinary experiences, such as encounters with ghosts, UFOs, and bizarre happenings, bringing thrilling topics to the audience.(n)

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: The brand-new children's program “Hands Up” encourages kids to ask questions bravely, express themselves, and pursue their goals! Members of the mascot “Sauce Family” join the hosts in performing short skits, accompanying everyone for joyful moments. The show will also feature a variety of children's songs, allowing kids to sing along while learning practical life knowledge.(n)

programme.title: Big City Shop 2026
programme.desc: “Big City Shop” introduces viewers to a wide range of timely topics, including seasonal products, health and wellness, fitness activities, skincare and makeup, fashion apparel, infant care, parenting knowledge, local delicacies, and pet care trends. The content is all-encompassing! In addition to hands-on demonstrations, experiences, or tests by the hosts, experts are invited to share their professional insights. In the cooking segment, several skilled culinary experts take turns showcasing simple and delicious healthy dishes and home-style recipes, helping everyone solve their cooking challenges.(n)

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: HUNG SHU-KAN (Lau Dan) built his own logistics business from scratch and now everything is in order. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, HUNG YUEK-SHUI (Koni Lui), is still single. She and her little prodigy sister, HUNG SUM-YUE (Andrea So), often fight over small things, putting their father in dilemmas.(n)

programme.title: The Inner Eye & What's On Today
programme.desc: When “The Inner Eye “follows Shenzhen lawyer Tang Yingying as she handles a series of controversial cases and gradually transforms from someone driven by victory and profit into a lawyer who rediscovers her professional conscience. Through cases involving sexual assault allegations, inheritance disputes, emotional and medical conflicts, domestic violence, and public opinion against lawyers, she witnesses the darkness and vulnerability of human nature. As the lives of Dai Peilin, Lin Xiaoyun, Kang Jun, Fang Weian and others intertwine with hers, Tang learns to “cover her eyes” and listen to her inner sense of justice and integrity, ultimately finding her own rebirth in law, love and life.(n)

programme.title: Journey to Jianghu (SR.2)
programme.desc: As the saying goes, "Reading ten thousand books is not as good as traveling ten thousand miles." Wayne Lai and Mak Cheung-ching embark on another journey, continuing their exploration of the magnificent landscapes depicted in Jin Yong's novels and delving into the martial arts world of Chinese history. They travel along the Yangtze and Yellow River basins, traversing Sichuan, Zhejiang, Henan, and Shanxi provinces, climbing Mount Emei's Golden Summit, visiting Baidi City, the Yue Fei Temple in Zhuxian Town, and exploring the Shaolin Temple on Mount Song. They experienced the weight of historical sites and savored local delicacies. The martial arts world is not only a stage for swords and shadows, but also a realm of intertwined human relationships. During their journey, they also reunited with Michelle Yim, Benny Chan, Louis Fan, and Jackie Lui, reminiscing about their past collaborations and laughing about bygone days.(n)

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Hong Kong life is vibrant and diverse, and "Hong Kong Life, Hong Kong Enjoyment" presents both sophisticated and elegant lifestyles and down-to-earth, high-quality experiences. The program combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.(n)

programme.title: Shock Mystery (Sr.2)
programme.desc: Human beings are innately curious about the unknown. Some even believe that not everything in life can be explained solely by scientific or physical phenomena. Even when there appears to be an acceptable answer on the surface, it may not fully resolve all our questions. The production team of " Shock Mystery" has collected hundreds of strange and unusual cases from around the world, most of which cannot be explained from the perspectives commonly accepted by people—unless supernatural phenomena truly exist in our world! This program will introduce you to incredible mysteries that not only existed in the past but still persist today!(n)

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: " Big Boys Club" is a youth talk show hosted by a group of close friends—Bob Lam, Oscar Leung, Derek Wong, Philip Fan, and Alan Chan. In each episode, singers, entertainers, or guests from various fields are invited for relaxed interviews, presenting a wide range of topics including current social issues, pop culture, and trending interests. Matters of love, relationships, and even same-sex relationships are endlessly discussed topics for men and women alike. The show invites guests from diverse backgrounds to explore love and relationships, delving into the dynamics between the sexes. The "Other Dimension" segment features guests sharing extraordinary experiences, such as encounters with ghosts, UFOs, and bizarre happenings, bringing thrilling topics to the audience.(n)

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1
programme.desc: "Sword and Fairy 1" is a period romance drama that tells the story of the complex and intertwined fates between Li Xiaoyao (played by He Yu) and Zhao Ling'er (played by Yang Yutong). Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with dreams of becoming a chivalrous hero, accidentally meets Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa, and other like-minded companions. Together, they overcome numerous hardships and dangers, dedicating them-selves to finding the Spirit Pearl. Supporting each other, they bravely shoulder the responsibility of saving the world, unafraid of sacrifice, and ultimately together maintain peace and tranquility in the world.(n)

programme.title: News At 18:30 & Global View & What's On Today
programme.desc: Jade Channel reports important local, cross-strait, and international news every afternoon at 6:30.(n)

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1
programme.desc: "Sword and Fairy 1" is a period romance drama that tells the story of the complex and intertwined fates between Li Xiaoyao (played by He Yu) and Zhao Ling'er (played by Yang Yutong). Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with dreams of becoming a chivalrous hero, accidentally meets Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa, and other like-minded companions. Together, they overcome numerous hardships and dangers, dedicating them-selves to finding the Spirit Pearl. Supporting each other, they bravely shoulder the responsibility of saving the world, unafraid of sacrifice, and ultimately together maintain peace and tranquility in the world.(n)

programme.title: Big City Shop 2026
programme.desc: “Big City Shop” introduces viewers to a wide range of timely topics, including seasonal products, health and wellness, fitness activities, skincare and makeup, fashion apparel, infant care, parenting knowledge, local delicacies, and pet care trends. The content is all-encompassing! In addition to hands-on demonstrations, experiences, or tests by the hosts, experts are invited to share their professional insights. In the cooking segment, several skilled culinary experts take turns showcasing simple and delicious healthy dishes and home-style recipes, helping everyone solve their cooking challenges.(n)

programme.title: Happy Old Buddies
programme.desc: Many people may think that older adults do not have sexual needs, but surveys have shown that this is not the case—older adults often experience less sexual activity due to various reasons. Clinical psychologist Lin Haoming from the Social Welfare Department explains the World Health Organization's definition of sexuality and offers advice for those hoping to rekindle their sex life with their partner. However, if one partner does not wish to resume sexual activity, how should both sides communicate?(n)

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Hong Kong life is vibrant and diverse, and "Hong Kong Life, Hong Kong Enjoyment" presents both sophisticated and elegant lifestyles and down-to-earth, high-quality experiences. The program combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.(n)

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong and Global View
programme.desc: Report important news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs.(n)

programme.title: EMISSARY
programme.desc: Jiang Dawei is an idealistic college student who joins the police force. He undergoes training at a law school and eventually becomes a police officer, surrounded by a diverse group of officers with varying personalities and backgrounds. Given the lawlessness of drug lords, Jiang Dawei accepts a secret order from his superior to orchestrate a frame-up and become an undercover detective, working as a trusted aide to a drug kingpin. He feigns compliance while secretly gathering evidence of the kingpin's crimes. Undercover, Jiang Dawei's personality drastically changes, and he faces misunderstanding from his father, relatives, and girlfriend, Wang Jiaqi. With no recourse, he vividly portrays the hardships of being a police officer.(n)

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: The brand-new children's program “Hands Up” encourages kids to ask questions bravely, express themselves, and pursue their goals! Members of the mascot “Sauce Family” join the hosts in performing short skits, accompanying everyone for joyful moments. The show will also feature a variety of children's songs, allowing kids to sing along while learning practical life knowledge.(n)

programme.title: Clash Of Chefs
programme.desc: When "Master Ding" Li Jiading and "Third Sister" Xiao Xiuxiang, known for their blend of strength and gentleness, meet, a brand new kitchen battle is about to begin! These two star chefs will pull out all the stops, igniting a series of fierce competition! Each episode features guests who present challenges to Master Ding and Third Sister, including renowned chefs and food connoisseurs, requiring them to use the same ingredients or themes to create dishes with distinct styles, competing and sharing their culinary experiences. Guests will critique the dishes blindly, their honest palates offering unbiased judgments based solely on taste. Afterwards, the two will temporarily truce and become judges, handing over the baton to "star apprentices" Chen Wei and Tan Junyan to continue the culinary showdown!(n)

programme.title: Gourmet Express
programme.desc: Hong Kong brings together global cuisines, and its unique dishes and down-to-earth fare have captured the close attention of discerning food lovers! Food hosts and presenters such as Icy Wong,Snowy Choi,Carmen Ngai,Carmaney Wong , Jessica Liu , Gillian Ng keep up with the latest food news and deals, delving into the stories behind the flavors. Gathering firsthand information on popular eateries across various platforms, the hosts personally line up and taste the food, providing genuine reviews. Even takeout-only eateries with no dine-in option are in high demand—what are the must-try picks? Running a food business inevitably comes with its own mix of sweet, sour, bitter, and spicy experiences. The production team follows the proprietors through their busy day, from sourcing ingredients and preparing materials to opening for business, uncovering the "stories behind the flavors.".(n)

programme.title: Vital Lifeline
programme.desc: Urban dwellers often experience a hectic pace of life and high levels of stress, making them more susceptible to health problems. "The Strongest Lifeline" helps you unravel the secrets to good health. To start, the program features a four-episode series on common urban pain issues, covering headaches, shoulder and neck pain, back pain, and joint pain. Each episode invites medical experts to explain the causes of these conditions, as well as physical therapists and exercise specialists to teach appropriate exercises. With the growing trend of integrating Eastern and Western medicine, even American swimming champion Michael Phelps uses cupping therapy to relieve pain. Therefore, each episode also includes traditional Chinese medical diagnosis, complemented by treatments such as acupuncture, cupping, and the “Sanfu” herbal patch therapy, which is especially suitable during the hottest days of summer. In addition, Chinese medicine practitioners share recipes for nourishing soups, all of which can help regulate and improve your health.(n)

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: " Big Boys Club" is a youth talk show hosted by a group of close friends—Bob Lam, Oscar Leung, Derek Wong, Philip Fan, and Alan Chan. In each episode, singers, entertainers, or guests from various fields are invited for relaxed interviews, presenting a wide range of topics including current social issues, pop culture, and trending interests. Matters of love, relationships, and even same-sex relationships are endlessly discussed topics for men and women alike. The show invites guests from diverse backgrounds to explore love and relationships, delving into the dynamics between the sexes. The "Other Dimension" segment features guests sharing extraordinary experiences, such as encounters with ghosts, UFOs, and bizarre happenings, bringing thrilling topics to the audience.(n)

programme.title: Winter Night
programme.desc: Zheng Daqian (Qiao Xin), a struggling office worker suffering setbacks in both love and career due to urban life's hardships, receives compensation for the demolition of her hometown in Northeast China and embarks on a journey back. A geomagnetic storm caused by a fireball leaves her train stranded in the wilderness. Witnessing the fireball, Zheng Daqian is shocked to find herself transported to a parallel universe! There, she encounters her deceased father, her mother who left despite never divorcing her, and her childhood friend and lost first love, Mu Zili (Ma Sichao)! Unable to return to her original world, Zheng Daqian seizes this opportunity to make amends for her past regrets, and the seeds of a budding romance with Mu Zili begin to sprout with the arrival of spring. Unfortunately, the fireball reappears, and Zheng Daqian and Mu Zili are destined to become lovers separated by two worlds, unable to touch each other…!(n)

programme.title: News At 18:30 & Global View & What's On Today
programme.desc: Jade Channel reports important local, cross-strait, and international news every afternoon at 6:30.(n)

The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.(n)

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong
programme.desc: Report important news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs.(n)

programme.title: Cooking Beauties
programme.desc: Edwin Siu, Bob, and Owen Cheung host the third season of "Cooking Beauties" A group of female celebrities, after hearing the dish name and a brief description of the cooking process, must then prepare a designated dish, maintaining an air of mystery while the male guests try to guess their identities. Each episode also features a specific fresh ingredient, allowing the female guests to unleash their creativity and produce unforgettable dishes, vying for high scores from the judges to become the new ultimate female chef. Low scores risk plunging them into the "Hell Chef" category, requiring a desperate comeback! Meanwhile, a group of beautiful apprentices are dedicated to developing bizarre and unusual dishes, striving to achieve "honors" status in their graduation exam!(n)

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Hong Kong life is vibrant and diverse, and "Hong Kong Life, Hong Kong Enjoyment" presents both sophisticated and elegant lifestyles and down-to-earth, high-quality experiences. The program combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.(n)

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: The brand-new children's program “Hands Up” encourages kids to ask questions bravely, express themselves, and pursue their goals! Members of the mascot “Sauce Family” join the hosts in performing short skits, accompanying everyone for joyful moments. The show will also feature a variety of children's songs, allowing kids to sing along while learning practical life knowledge.(n)

programme.title: Wife, Interrupted
programme.desc: The story revolves around an ordinary man who risks himself to save his beloved wife. Computer engineer LEE YAN-LONG (Hubert Wu) and his wife CHIU CHEUK-WING (Moon Lau) lead an ordinary happy life until one day they get kidnapped by thugs, who threaten to kill CHEUK-WING, unless YAN-LONG repays them $100 million within 72 hours! Bewildered, YAN-LONG reports it to the police, thus re-encounters his former roommate, now hot-blooded detective LEUNG HIU-YEUNG (Alvin Ng) and high school crush TONG MEI-LAN (Ashley Chu). With help from MEI-LAN, YAN-LONG uncovers that everything is related to the youth hostel where he stayed years ago, and the online trading platform he ran with other roommates has become a money laundering hub. They investigate those that stayed in the hostel in search of the culprit, triggering memories of the past, and all the evidence seems to point at CHEUNG TSZ-KIN (Telford Wong). As the deadline approaches and the truth is just one step away, YAN-LONG discovers that each of them including his own wife has a secret side to themselves…….(n)

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.(n)

programme.title: Gourmet Express
programme.desc: Hong Kong brings together global cuisines, and its unique dishes and down-to-earth fare have captured the close attention of discerning food lovers! Food hosts and presenters such as Icy Wong,Snowy Choi,Carmen Ngai,Carmaney Wong , Jessica Liu , Gillian Ng keep up with the latest food news and deals, delving into the stories behind the flavors. Gathering firsthand information on popular eateries across various platforms, the hosts personally line up and taste the food, providing genuine reviews. Even takeout-only eateries with no dine-in option are in high demand—what are the must-try picks? Running a food business inevitably comes with its own mix of sweet, sour, bitter, and spicy experiences. The production team follows the proprietors through their busy day, from sourcing ingredients and preparing materials to opening for business, uncovering the "stories behind the flavors.".(n)

programme.title: Scam Alert!
programme.desc: The number of various scams continues to rise, with the amounts involved becoming increasingly staggering. It is reported that Hong Kong suffers an average daily loss of HK$25 million, with a scam occurring every 13 minutes… Scams targeting online shopping, job seeking, investment, dating apps, and telephone scams are becoming increasingly sophisticated. Citizens must raise their awareness of scams and be vigilant to avoid falling victim! Hosts Au Wing-Kuen, Edwin Siu, Lee Man-Fong, and Leung Man-Hau gather various real-life cases to gain a deeper understanding of how victims were scammed. The program will also recreate these scenarios in story form. Experts will appear to dissect different methods of committing these crimes, helping viewers identify money-grabbing traps and avoid becoming targets of scammers!(n)

programme.title: ChatSAT
programme.desc: It will do its utmost to gather the trendiest and latest information from around the world, covering everything from global events, medical encyclopedias, arts, and technology to daily life and trending online topics, sharing them with the audience every Saturday. By discussing everything under the sun and chatting about the hottest topics, “Group friend” listeners can easily stay up to date with global trends by following the program.(n)

programme.title: Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4
programme.desc: " Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4" has officially launched, continuing the success of the previous three seasons and once again providing a stage for singing enthusiasts to pursue their dreams. This season expands its recruitment efforts to North America and Australia, with several TVB artists participating "masked," igniting the flame of music globally and illuminating the hearts of countless dreamers. Stephanie Che continues to host, offering her warm smile to the contestants; Maria Cordero, Chow Kwok-fung, Cheung Ka-tim, Hai-er, and Gu Ya-wei also serve as judges, providing professional feedback and encouragement to the participants. On this new season's stage, everyone will weave an even more moving chapter with music, continuing the heartfelt story of " Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4.".(n)

programme.title: Star Weekly
programme.desc: The talk show "Star Weekly" invites celebrities and industry leaders each episode, along with entertainment anchors such as Au Wing-Kuen, Hsu Wen-Hsuan, and Wang Chen-Chuan, to share their recent work plans and discuss special topics related to movies, television, and concerts, especially people and events that netizens and friends in the industry are concerned about and discussing! With so much surrounding information, the show features a special "Fact Check" segment, where guests personally respond to various rumors, allowing the parties involved to clarify the truth!(n)

programme.title: Gourmet Express Weekly
programme.desc: Hong Kong is a melting pot of global cuisine! Food anchors and hosts like Carmaney Wong,Carmen Ngai,Gillian Ng stay up-to-date with the latest culinary trends, gathering information on top-rated restaurants from various platforms. The hosts personally sample the food and provide honest reviews; they uncover hidden gems in different districts and invite long-time expatriates to visit their favorite hometown eateries; renowned chefs and food critics also guide the way, offering expert recommendations. The program features a selection of popular restaurants featured in "Food News Report," highlighting their signature dishes and delivering quick deals, ensuring viewers stay up-to-date with the most delicious and affordable dining information.(n)

programme.title: Clash Of Chefs
programme.desc: When "Master Ding" Li Jiading and "Third Sister" Xiao Xiuxiang, known for their blend of strength and gentleness, meet, a brand new kitchen battle is about to begin! These two star chefs will pull out all the stops, igniting a series of fierce competition! Each episode features guests who present challenges to Master Ding and Third Sister, including renowned chefs and food connoisseurs, requiring them to use the same ingredients or themes to create dishes with distinct styles, competing and sharing their culinary experiences. Guests will critique the dishes blindly, their honest palates offering unbiased judgments based solely on taste. Afterwards, the two will temporarily truce and become judges, handing over the baton to "star apprentices" Chen Wei and Tan Junyan to continue the culinary showdown!(n)

programme.title: News At 18:30
programme.desc: Jade Channel reports important local, cross-strait, and international news every afternoon at 6:30.(n)

programme.title: News Magazine 2026 & Yes, Boss.
programme.desc: "News Perspective" is a weekly program featuring in-depth coverage of notable news stories from Hong Kong and around the world. It focuses on social issues that matter most to Hong Kong residents and invites people from various sectors, scholars, and experts to discuss and analyze the underlying causes and developments.(n)

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.(n)

programme.title: Hong Kong: Never Too Small
programme.desc: Amidst the ebb and flow of time, local shops that depict the microcosm of the city are becoming increasingly rare. Yet, they are a vital part of the city's structure and an irreplaceable embodiment of the Hong Kong spirit. With this in mind, the down-to-earth host, Louis Yuen, leads viewers on a shop-by-shop exploration, visiting time-honored and modern shops across four key areas of daily life: clothing, food, housing, and transportation. He reveals the shops' operating history, the hardships of maintaining them, and the stories behind generations, using these tangible shops to preserve intangible memories and showcasing the enduring beauty of "small spaces.".(n)

programme.title: Caritas Star Studded Charity Show 2026 (Live)
programme.desc: The 2026 Caritas charity special, themed "Messengers of Hope," highlights the inspiring journeys of people who overcame hardship with the organization's help and are now paying that kindness forward to their communities.(n)

programme.title: J Music 2026
programme.desc: J Music is dedicated to creating a high-quality music platform, providing singers with opportunities to showcase their musical talents while allowing music fans to gain a deeper understanding of their musical stories. The program invites popular singers as guests, who personally select their favorite new and old works, perform them live, and share their favorite tracks. New faces in the music scene will also appear, showcasing their musical potential through interactive exchanges. Furthermore, each episode closely follows the latest developments on the Jade Solid Gold Chart, featuring music videos and interviews with various singers, songwriters, and producers, who discuss their work and the people and events within the music industry.(n)

programme.title: Thai Rogered (Sr.11)
programme.desc: "Thailand expert" Hu Huichong once again leads the "Tom Yum Family" members to introduce the latest travel information in Bangkok, including glamorous massage parlors with perfect photo spots, newly opened shopping malls with sky parks, and buffet restaurants hailed as the pinnacle of Bangkok tourism. The content is truly rich in Thai elements. In addition, "Bobo" Huang Jingling continues to appear in this episode, giving away plenty of perks. She will accompany Hu Huichong to visit Ayutthaya, Khao Yai, and other areas around Bangkok, recommending popular holiday destinations for locals. Besides "unboxing" hotels, they will also visit pseudo-Japanese photo spots and hotel-attached children's playgrounds, guaranteeing an authentic Thai experience.(n)

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, as well as sports updates, keeping you informed about important events and trends in the world of sports.(n)

programme.title: The Joy Of Nature
programme.desc: Taiwan's camping destinations are breathtaking! Hong Kong host Lin Yinghui, along with three of Taiwan's goddesses Lin Xiang, Zhang Yahan, and Huang Shangyan, embarked on a nature-themed healing trip. They traversed Nantou, Kaohsiung, Taoyuan, and other locations, delving into the Miaoli mountains, trying out forest cabins, luxury campervans, deluxe tents, and even camping at a baseball stadium… Surrounded by mountains, they enjoyed open-air hot springs, watched the sunset at the beach, explored historical sites near the campsites, and immersed themselves in nature. Finally, they returned to Yangmingshan in Taipei for camping, soaking in hot springs, and overlooking the unparalleled night view of Taipei! Besides experiencing the unique atmosphere of camping, what sparks will fly between the Taiwanese and Hong Kong women as they interact and bond?(n)

programme.title: New Taiwan Is Online

programme.title: Pro on their Speciality
programme.desc: A popular educational documentary programs that record and reports all sorts of business stories all over the land of Taiwan.(n)

programme.title: The Sound of Happiness
programme.desc: Wu is a senior police officer has always wanted a son to carry his family name and join the force. However, he and wife are bequeathed with four daughters! As a doting father, his chief objective is to help them find happiness in their marriages. In this charming drama, Wu & his wife become their daughters greatest haven, through the ups and downs they face as married women.(n)

programme.title: The Tradition Story of Taiwan
programme.desc: The Tradition Story of Taiwan presents a series of tales and folktales in Taiwan that have been pass down from one generation to another generation.(n)

programme.title: Taste of Life
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai Chao and his wife have five children. Having devoted his entire life to developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai sincerely hopes that one of his children will follow in his footsteps and take over the family business. However, he also respects their individual passions and aspirations. Because of their fathers dream of innovation, the lives of the Chao brothers are about to change.(n)

programme.title: Blessing of Formosa
programme.desc: The beauty of folklore is all around us in Taiwan, but we often overlook it and fail to appreciate and feel it. The aim of this program is to promote the beauty of Taiwanese folklore and bring folklore to life. This program showcases folk culture regardless of race or religion, and presents travel information in a fun way, combining easy-to-understand folk culture knowledge with the mission of passing on folk culture. The audience can learn more about folk cultural products such as handicrafts, antiques, temple folklore, as well as short stories about the gods, and information about local tourism. It is an educational and entertaining way to travel and learn about folklore.(n)

programme.title: Hot Door Night
programme.desc: Different in age, generation, and hosting style, these three hosts not only can sing, act, dance, and imitate, but are also skilled in cross-talk! With this unique combination, we hope to attract viewers of all ages and spark great entertainment.(n)

programme.desc: A warm and relatable lifestyle talk show that explores the daily dynamics between mothers, daughters-in-law, and modern families. Through real stories, lighthearted conversations, and practical tips on relationships, parenting, and home life, the program highlights touching and humorous moments that help viewers navigate family harmony with ease.(n)

programme.title: The Sound of Happiness
programme.desc: Wu is a senior police officer has always wanted a son to carry his family name and join the force. However, he and wife are bequeathed with four daughters! As a doting father, his chief objective is to help them find happiness in their marriages. In this charming drama, Wu & his wife become their daughters greatest haven, through the ups and downs they face as married women.(n)

programme.title: The Tradition Story of Taiwan
programme.desc: The Tradition Story of Taiwan presents a series of tales and folktales in Taiwan that have been pass down from one generation to another generation.(n)

programme.title: Taste of Life
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai Chao and his wife have five children. Having devoted his entire life to developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai sincerely hopes that one of his children will follow in his footsteps and take over the family business. However, he also respects their individual passions and aspirations. Because of their fathers dream of innovation, the lives of the Chao brothers are about to change.(n)

programme.title: Taste of Life
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai Chao and his wife have five children. Having devoted his entire life to developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai sincerely hopes that one of his children will follow in his footsteps and take over the family business. However, he also respects their individual passions and aspirations. Because of their fathers dream of innovation, the lives of the Chao brothers are about to change.(n)

programme.title: New Taiwan Is Online
programme.desc: In a media landscape flooded with misinformation, this current affairs programme cuts through the noise with sharp analysis and investigative reporting. Hosted by Lee Cheng Hao, the show uncovers hidden issues and speaks up for the people, delivering clarity and accountability in every episode.(n)

programme.title: Mommy Says
programme.desc: A warm and relatable lifestyle talk show that explores the daily dynamics between mothers, daughters-in-law, and modern families. Through real stories, lighthearted conversations, and practical tips on relationships, parenting, and home life, the program highlights touching and humorous moments that help viewers navigate family harmony with ease.(n)

programme.title: Venus Online
programme.desc: Venus Online is a vibrant lifestyle and beauty show featuring the latest in makeup, skincare, and fashion. Each episode shares practical tips and fun challenges that inspire confidence and celebrate personal style.(n)

programme.title: Girls Tease
programme.desc: This show focuses on the issues that are most important to urban modern women. It combines current events with discussions of life's major and minor problems and invites various specialists to address various difficulties. Netizens will occasionally attend the show to share their own stories and ask questions of the guests and experts, making the topics more relevant and audience-focused!(n)

programme.title: Top Singers
programme.desc: The show 'Top Singers' aims to spotlight outstanding Taiwanese singers and composers, setting a new standard in the industry. Combining elements of competition, variety, and personal stories, the show welcomes participants of all ages. Its goals include discovering grassroots talent, innovating Taiwanese song performance styles, and involving more local talent in song composition to infuse new life into Taiwanese music.(n)

programme.title: Show Biz
programme.desc: Every second counts in "Show Biz" to bring you with the most High Speed star news, exciting live shows and performers interviews.(n)

programme.title: Love, Now
programme.desc: Lan Shi De, who lost his first love in college, reunites with Yang Yi Ru in a foreign land. When he learns she has only six months to live, he decides to marry her and fulfill her dream wedding. Eight days later, she mysteriously disappears, and Shi De vows not to let true love slip away again.(n)

programme.title: Love, Now
programme.desc: Lan Shi De, who lost his first love in college, reunites with Yang Yi Ru in a foreign land. When he learns she has only six months to live, he decides to marry her and fulfill her dream wedding. Eight days later, she mysteriously disappears, and Shi De vows not to let true love slip away again.(n)

programme.title: Show Biz
