When he learns she has only six months to live, he decides to marry her and fulfill her dream wedding. Eight days later, she mysteriously disappears, and Shi De vows not to let true love slip away again.(n)

programme.title: Love, Now
programme.desc: Lan Shi De, who lost his first love in college, reunites with Yang Yi Ru in a foreign land. When he learns she has only six months to live, he decides to marry her and fulfill her dream wedding. Eight days later, she mysteriously disappears, and Shi De vows not to let true love slip away again.(n)

programme.title: Mommy Says
programme.desc: A warm and relatable lifestyle talk show that explores the daily dynamics between mothers, daughters-in-law, and modern families. Through real stories, lighthearted conversations, and practical tips on relationships, parenting, and home life, the program highlights touching and humorous moments that help viewers navigate family harmony with ease.(n)

programme.title: Far Far Away
programme.desc: A 28-year-old IT geek has only been in love once. Surprisingly, he ends up getting romantically involved with five different women this year and the one thing they have in common is that they all live in far flung areas of Hong Kong. After taking five intensive relationship courses within these 365 days, will he find “the-one”?(n)

programme.title: Panda Plan: The Magical Tribe
programme.desc: International superstar Jackie Chan and the adorable panda Hu Hu are accidentally summoned to a mysterious primitive tribe. Their journey is interrupted by an ambush from international robbers. During the fierce struggle, Jackie and Hu Hu accidentally fall off a cliff and stumble into an isolated world.(n)

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Set in 2020 during the outbreak of COVID-19, the movie features interconnected stories of three women's lives as they navigate the uncertain future amongst their respective friends and families. From the struggles at home to challenges in relationships and conflicts at work, these three women rise with strength when faced with plights unknown.(n)

programme.title: The Mermaid
programme.desc: A real estate tycoon plans to turn a marine protected area into a new property development, thereby destroying the secret habitat of the mermaids. A beautiful mermaid, Shan, is tasked to seduce the tycoon and stop the destruction. However, when Shan's mission fails, a final, fatal war between humans and mermaids becomes inevitable.(n)

programme.title: I Still Remember
programme.desc: Chi is a property agent who leads an aimless and unfulfilling life until he reunites with his P.E. teacher, Wong, from primary school. Despite his illness, Wong insists on keeping his promise of completing a 10K marathon to his late wife. Inspired by Wong, Chi brings himself to his feet and finds the courage to cheer himself on!(n)

programme.title: The Bride With White Hair
programme.desc: As Wudang disciple Zhuo Yi Hang confronts the Demon Palace, he reunites with Lian Ni Shang, the woman who once saved him, and their love reignites. Lian, a disciple of the Demon Palace, endures torment to be with Zhuo but is shattered when he accidentally injures her. A fierce battle between good and evil unfolds!(n)

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.(n)

programme.title: Montages of a Modern Motherhood
programme.desc: Shu Zhen's life takes a sharp downturn after the birth of her daughter. Exhausted by the demands of caring for a newborn and neglected by her indifferent husband, she finds herself caught in growing family conflicts, postnatal turmoil, and unyielding work stress. Through long and lonely nights, will the dawn bring her hope or despair?(n)

programme.title: Flying Swords of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: This is a remake of the original 1966 classic, Dragon Gate Inn. The country is being policed by the East and West Bureaus, whilst the Emperor's eunuchs have attained much power and control. With all the corruption, Zhao teams up with a group of assassins to systemically kill the eunuchs in order to save the country.(n)

programme.title: Sifu VS Vampire
programme.desc: This is a horror comedy about Sifu, Charlie Jiang, and his team of vampire hunters taking on the Vampire King who has been let loose on the streets of Hong Kong.(n)

programme.title: 8 Bucks Tycoon
programme.desc: When a struggling painter receives a magical wallet that endlessly produces RM8 notes, his life transforms from hardship to luxury. However, is this miracle truly a blessing or a hidden curse?(n)

programme.title: Tales from the Occult: Ultimate Malevolence
programme.desc: The final chapter of 'Tales From The Occult', the movie features three short stories about two high school friends, a magician undergoing hypnosis to find her missing friend, and a man finding his way out of a mysterious building. The stories reveal the most terrifying and ugly side of human nature, where life and death are just a thought away!(n)

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: A wild and hilariously anachronistic tale of an imperial guard of the Forbidden City who has no martial arts abilities. When the emperor is abducted, he saved the day with his unusual hobby: tinkering with futuristic inventions!(n)

programme.title: Wise Guys Never Die
programme.desc: Nick meets Teddy, a con artiste, when he is sent to prison for embezzlement, and Teddy teaches him all the gambling tricks. After their release, they team up with Teddy's lover Lora, to take revenge on Dragon, who framed Teddy for his sentence. Nick though is seduced by Lora and they end up in an affair. Will Nick finally join Teddy in his revenge?(n)

programme.title: Ready O/R Knot
programme.desc: Guy and Heidi have been together for five years since they first met in a wedding banquet, but marriage soon becomes a challenge to their relationship. Heidi sees marriage as a testimony of their love, while Guy sees it as doomsday. Can the couple resolve their conflict? Are they ready or not?(n)

programme.title: God of Gambler's Return
programme.desc: The God of Gamblers, Gao Jin, quits gambling and lives a quiet life with his wife. However, a Taiwanese crime boss wants to become the new God of Gamblers and get rid of him, so he kills Gao Jin's pregnant wife to force him to the casino table. Gao Jin is indignant and vows to fight the crime boss to avenge his wife's death.(n)

programme.title: Z Storm
programme.desc: ICAC Chief Officer Luk is on the case of a corrupt policeman but finds all key witnesses killed when he starts to discover some clues. As investigation continues, Luk uncovers the fraud scheme of an organized corrupt group involving the government's $15 billion 'Care Fund'. He must fight against them to keep Hong Kong corruption free.(n)

programme.title: All's Well End's Well (Extended Version)
programme.desc: In this beloved Hong Kong comedy, the three Chang brothers living with their parents learn that love blossoms with nurture, but withers when taken for granted through haste, deceit, and selfishness. This extended version features an additional shootout scene that was omitted from the original theatrical release during Lunar New Year 2016.(n)

programme.title: American Girl
programme.desc: 13 year-old Fen is uprooted from LA and moves to Taipei in early 2003, when her mother is diagnosed with breast cancer. She struggles to adjust to her new life with a new school and long-separated father, and drifts away from her mother. When her younger sister is misdiagnosed with SARS, they finally open up to each other during quarantine.(n)

programme.title: Dumpling Queen, The
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Zang moves to Hong Kong with her two daughters following a failed marriage. Starting as a dishwasher and odd-job worker, she struggles to survive. With a family dumpling recipe, she sets up a stall at Wan Chai Pier and rises from a street vendor to the city's renowned “Dumpling Queen”.(n)

programme.title: The Vanished Murderer
programme.desc: Set in Northern China in 1932, inmate Fu Yuan escapes from prison by digging a tunnel with a silver spoon. Inspector Song Dong Lu is assigned to investigate the case. Following letters sent by Fu, Song travels to Hong City to uncover the mystery behind her disappearance, facing deeper conspiracies along the way.(n)

programme.title: Endgame
programme.desc: A killer and a stage actor accidentally swapped their identities at a bathhouse. The actor must complete the killer's mission while the killer thinks he is a hopeless actor after losing his memory during the accident. When the killer strives to become a successful stage actor, he also starts to recall what has happened….(n)

programme.title: The Phantom Lover
programme.desc: In 1926 China, Sung, a talented singer, is deeply in love with To, a sweet innocent girl from a wealthy family. Their love evokes strong disapproval from To's father and bitter jealousy from her designated fiancé, a young man chosen by her family. This is a story about a singer and a wealthy girl battling to be together in a traditional community.(n)

programme.title: Resurrection
programme.desc: In a world where humans have ceased to dream, a monster drifts through the fading illusions of the dreamworld. Clinging to visions no one else can see, its solitude is interrupted by a woman uniquely gifted to perceive these hidden dreams. Choosing to step into the monster's dreams, she seeks the truth that lies hidden within.(n)

programme.title: Dragon Tiger Gate
programme.desc: Adapted from a famous Hong Kong comic, Tiger Wong is ambushed after he unwittingly took the Lousha Plaque but is saved by his brother Dragon Wong. They also befriended Turbo Shek during the fight and the trio forms a brotherhood. To avenge the death of the Dragon Gate masters, they train and vow to defeat Shibumi, the leader of Lousha Clan.(n)

programme.title: As It Burns
programme.desc: Detective Wei investigates the death of Yan Zhen in an explosion which seems more than an accident to him. Wei then finds out that Yan Zhen looks a lot like Yin, the girlfriend of Yan Zhen's childhood friend Lu, and uncovers a tangled web of deceit leading to surprising revelations when he merges details from the past and the present.(n)

programme.title: Quan Dao: The Journey of a Boxer
programme.desc: Ah Niu learns boxing from Uncle Xing, the boss of a boxing studio, since young and uses his skills to help the weak fight villains. When Xing's son attempts drug trafficking to save his father's studio but fails and is brutally beaten up, Ah Niu accepts a death combat challenge so as to help him take revenge.(n)

programme.title: The Way We Keep Dancing
programme.desc: This sequel of “The Way We Dance” features the plight of Hong Kong's grassroots performing artists as they fight against the government's plan to gentrify an industrial district where they settled in.(n)

programme.title: Death Notice
programme.desc: A serial killer leaves death notices in a city, stating when, how and who he will murder. Even if the victims report it to the police and receive protection, the killer can still break through and execute them. While the police sets up a special task force in response, they expose an even bigger conspiracy behind.(n)

programme.title: Battle of the Wolf
programme.desc: On his flight home, former special forces sergeant Zhang Zhi Yong and his wife find themselves caught in a terrorist conspiracy masterminded by international criminals. Drawing on his unwavering courage and tactical expertise, he protects his wife and fellow passengers while dismantling the deadly plot and ensuring everyone's safe return home.(n)

programme.title: Old Fox
programme.desc: In 1989, young Liao Jie and his father save for a home, unaware of rising property prices. Frustrated by poverty, he learns from their landlord Old Fox who teaches him survival in society. Liao Jie ends up hurting Old Fox with what he has learnt, but his empathy prevents him from becoming like Old Fox.(n)

programme.title: S Storm
programme.desc: ICAC Chief Officer Luk witnesses a suspect's murder while investigating an illegal soccer gambling case, but is unable to disclose information to Chief Inspector Lau due to his code of confidentiality, thereby hindering Lau's investigation. While starting the case with mutual distrust, they end up reaching a rapport to uproot the crime syndicate.(n)

programme.title: Where The Wind Blows
programme.desc: Founded in the 70s, Hong Kong's ICAC is committed to fight corruption in the police force. Detectives Lui Lok and Nam Kong build a corruption system that creates conflicts between the triad and the police. When ICAC hunts down the two, their control finally comes to an end. Where the wind blows, Hong Kong is no longer what it used to be!(n)

programme.title: Panda Plan: The Magical Tribe
programme.desc: International superstar Jackie Chan and the adorable panda Hu Hu are accidentally summoned to a mysterious primitive tribe. Their journey is interrupted by an ambush from international robbers. During the fierce struggle, Jackie and Hu Hu accidentally fall off a cliff and stumble into an isolated world.(n)

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...(n)

programme.title: The Invisible Guest
programme.desc: Young and beautiful entrepreneur Joanna is a prime suspect in a locked-room murder where her lover is found dead. She pays off a police officer to prove her innocence. During the investigation, they discover another murder case involving Joanna and her lover, and eventually reveals the truth.(n)

programme.title: To Live and Die in Mongkok
programme.desc: Fai (Nick Cheung), a legendary triad figure, was convicted and sent to prison for slaughtering a bunch of people. 30 years later, with the help of a social worker (Chan Lai Wan), Fai release from prison, the city of Mongkok has totally changed and he has almost forgotten his way back home. Disoriented and trapped in the notorious town of vices, Fai must find his way out of a life with a mother suffering from Alzheimer's disease (Paw Hee Ching), a hooker girlfriend (Mo Xiaoqi) with her mentally-challenged younger sister (Natalie Meng), and a malicious cop (Liu Kai Chi) hot on his tail.(n)

programme.title: Ready O/r Rot
programme.desc: Guy and Heidi are finally getting married but pressure from Guy's mother creates much friction between them. Meanwhile, Grey Bear suspects his wife of cheating on him and Ken faces the biggest crisis of his life when Jessica accidentally gets pregnant. Can they eventually solve their relationship problems?(n)

programme.title: Look Up
programme.desc: This film celebrates the 25th anniversary of Hong Kong's Handover in a series of four cultural stories about young Hong Kongers from different walks of life: a young man with autism pursuing his dream, a reconciliation between father and son, a Chinese opera star helping young pop singers, and a Nepali youth becoming a professional lion dancer.(n)

programme.title: The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: This side-splitting comedy sees naive Ah Niu headed to Hong Kong, where he is repeatedly exploited and taken advantage of, and eventually finds himself arrested and imprisoned! Can he survive difficult times and finally overcome adversity?(n)

programme.title: Pale Passion
programme.desc: Fa is an obsessive man who loves his wife Ah Hsia but is easily jealous and abuses her. When she leaves him one day, Fa hooks up with another woman, Hsing. A deadly triangle develops when Fa runs into Ah Hsia again and decides to win her back….(n)

programme.title: The Magnificent Ruffians
programme.desc: Renowned martial arts clan heir Yuan Ying Fei hires four down-and-out martial artists to eliminate the local escort agency's young chief, Guan Yuan. Unexpectedly, the four befriend Guan instead. When Yuan's conspiracy leads to Guan's death, they unite to avenge him.(n)

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung goes incognito to mix with his people and understand their needs. He encounters many strange things along the way, including being arrested and nearly beheaded. Who will save him?(n)

programme.title: The Iron Buddha
programme.desc: After a notorious rapist Xiao kills his master and the entire clan, Han the last surviving disciple, decides to take revenge. He must find the legendary Hulong Blade to counter Xiao's Evil Poisonous Sword, but as Han has never seen Xiao before, he is deceived when Xiao poses as an ally to try and steal his Blade in the process.(n)

programme.title: The Mirror and the Lichee
programme.desc: The curious title in this Huangmei Opera romance refers to the two props that signal a happy beginning between a scholar and a local beauty. The scholar polishes mirrors so as to be closer to his love, who signals her approval by tossing him some lichees. From that point on the course of their love becomes rocky, complete with murder and suicide.(n)

programme.title: Killers Five
programme.desc: The Duke's daughter has been kidnapped by the notorious Golden Dragon Hill bandits. A swordman named Yue Zhen Bei is assigned to save her, and expecting many dangers on the journey, Yue garners help from a group of good friends who are also kung fu masters.(n)

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Mongolian emperor Kublai Khan is being assassinated while meeting with the Italian explorer Marco Polo. Marco Polo is appointed to lead the troops for the emperor to wipe out the anti-Mongol rebels. Yet, he is touched by these rebels who are resisting the Mongolian invasion of their homeland. Will Marco Polo stay loyal to the emperor?(n)

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?(n)

programme.title: Princess Iron Fan
programme.desc: Tang San Zang and his disciples are halted by the Flaming Mountains, where only Princess Iron Fan's fan can quench the fire. Refused help by the Bull Demon King and his wife, Sun Wukong must outwit them to obtain it. After crossing, they fall into a trap set by the White Bone Demon sisters, and Wukong must use his powers to save his master.(n)

programme.title: Vengeance
programme.desc: Yu Lou is betrayed by his wife and eventually killed by her lover, Fung, who is the boss of a martial arts school. Yu Lou's brother, Xiao Lou, knows about his tragic death and is determined to take revenge for him.(n)

programme.title: The Perfumed Arrow
programme.desc: A charming Huangmei Opera title, this is the story of Fei E, a General's daughter who grows up fooling everyone that she is a boy, including her two closest schoolmates. When she has to choose one of them to marry, how will Fei E tell them that she is a girl? To complicate matters, a girl who Fei E saves one day only wants to be married to her!(n)

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: Set in the Tang Dynasty, the 13 adopted sons of Sha Tuo King are all renowned as royal warriors. David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealously, leading to a gruesome family feud.(n)

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: An elderly landowner marries young Dai Nan to keep his inheritance away from his unscrupulous nephew before he dies. When Dai Nan brings along the deed to meet his other nephew, a series of amusing incidents happen with this “young” auntie, the nephew and his son. Kara Hui won Best Actress in the first Hong Kong Film Awards for her role as Dai Nan.(n)

programme.title: Ten Tigers Of Kwang Tung
programme.desc: The Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung is a group of anti-Ching martial artists who have killed a Ching official. Years later, when five disciples and descendants of Ten Tigers meet one night, one of them is killed by the son of the late Ching official who returns with a vengeance. They must fight against him to protect the Ten Tigers clan….(n)

programme.title: The Web of Death
programme.desc: To rule the martial arts world, the Head of the Snake Sect seeks to possess a deadly plant called “Five Poison Web”, spreading rumours on its whereabouts. Brothers Xiong and Kit are sent to investigate. Xiong falls in love with Su who has a clue of where the plant is, but she accidentally hurts Kit when seeking the plant, devastating Xiong.(n)

programme.title: Vengeance is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: Convoy Master Li's wife has an affair with his rival Long, who plans to steal Li's Golden Blade and kill him as well as his young daughter. Li and his daughter manage to escape and the latter grows up to be a skilled swordswoman who vows to avenge her mother's death - a lie told by Li. The truth is revealed when she sees her mother alive by chance.(n)

programme.title: The Bride Napping
programme.desc: A rich girl Yue Ying, together with her maid Chun Lan, encounter a poor scholar Bian Ji at a fête. Chun Lan realizes Yue Ying is in love with him, but mixes his identity with a bandit due to an old servant's confusion, threatening the couple's union. After a series of complications, misunderstandings and mismatches, Chun Lan finally saves the day.(n)

programme.title: The Scandalous Warlord
programme.desc: General Feng occupies the city of Shandong, and soldiers and civilians alike welcome him without knowing his tyrannical and lustful nature. His first official business is to inspect the brothels and take the prostitutes home to become his concubines. Feng is finally killed by his officers, but will the new general rule the city differently?(n)

programme.title: The Grand Substitution
programme.desc: In this Opera epic, a loyal Imperial Court servant gives up his own newborn son to save the prince from an evil official.(n)

programme.title: Heroes Shed No Tears
programme.desc: Kao Chien Fei is a young swordsman who wields a special sword with a teardrop marked on its blade. He is charged with averting an impending crisis in the martial arts world, but the villain, Zhou Tung Lai, wishes to become the ruler in the martial arts world, and launches a scheme to pit the various heroes against one another.(n)

programme.title: The Dancing Millionairess
programme.desc: Peter was a key dancer in a dance troupe and applied to be the chauffeur of a rich girl, Betty. When he is rumoured to be her lover, Betty is furious and goes undercover as a reporter to investigate the rumour. They fall in love in the process, and after putting Peter through many tests, they finally seal their love with a dance.(n)

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Li Cheng Ying's father was set up and killed by his old friend Ling Hao. Li, who has learnt “Shaolin Hand Lock” from his father, is on a mission to avenge his death. He works as an undercover guard at Ling's house where he meets his long-lost brother, and the two team up to take revenge for their father against Ling.(n)

programme.title: The Twin Bracelets
programme.desc: Two teenage girls make a pledge to look after each other in a small Chinese fishing town, where the notions of women's rights or sexual freedom are absent. One ends up happily married to a stranger, while the other is cruelly betrothed to the abusive son of a wealthy family and has to seek to free herself from the situation.(n)

programme.title: The Knight Of Knights
programme.desc: Wen Su Chen, the leader of seven knights, sends his six sworn brothers to investigate a monastery. Unfortunately, they are killed by an abbot who plans to murder Inspector Lin. Wen saved Lin and battles the abbot to avenge his dead sworn brothers. With Lin and his army's help, they bring down the ruthless monks in the monastery.(n)

programme.title: Hell Has No Boundary
programme.desc: Cheng Chung (Derek Yee) and May (Liu Hsueh-hua), a pair of lovers working on the police force, camp on an outlying island. Awakened by a strange sound, May goes out onto the beach where a violent frenzy grips her. After her return from leave, May insists Inspector Wang (Yueh Hua) in a bid to rescue some hostages. She shoots the thug under most peculiar circumstances. Then a series of tragedies occur. Her two colleagues die mangled in a lift accident and Inspector Wang is injured at his desk by a snake. Wang's exorcist sister (Hsia Ping), who performs rites for him, also dies in an accident. And so does a fortune-teller who refused to read May's fortune.(n)

programme.title: The Empress Dowager
programme.desc: Award-winning drama featuring a passionate performance by Lisa Lu, enhanced by sumptuous costumes and sets, produces a powerful, fascinating story. In five thousand years of Chinese history, there was never a more fascinating woman than the dragon lady of the Ching Dynasty, also the Empress Dowager, who was the power behind the throne for the last half of the 19th century. The vast tapestry of palace intrigues is vividly brought to the screen.(n)

programme.title: Enchanting Shadow
programme.desc: A young scholar Ning spends the night in a creepy temple that is said to be haunted. He does not believe in the rumours, but soon meets a beautiful female ghost Nie. Nie is forced to stay in the temple to seduce young men for a powerful demon to feast on. Knowing Nie to be a kind ghost, Ning decides to help her escape from the demon's clutches.(n)

programme.title: Human Lanterns
programme.desc: Zhao was once defeated by Long in a duel. 7 years later, Long asks Zhao to make a unique lantern on his behalf to win the lantern contest, while Zhao plans for revenge. When Long's wife suddenly disappears one day and he hears about the story of human lanterns, Long suspects Zhao may be involved in the incident….(n)

programme.title: Lovers Blades
programme.desc: The Lovers Blades, a pair of invincible weapons, are to be delivered to the Qing Emperor. However, they accidentally fell into the hands of Xiao Zhong Hui and Yuan Guan Nan, so Imperial Chief Zhuo Tian Xiong hunts them down for the blades. As the battle begins, the secret of the blades are also revealed.(n)

programme.title: The Tiger and the Widow
programme.desc: The Liu Chia-liang trained Hui Ying-hung was considered the top action martial arts female star in the 1980s. It is her martial arts abilities that Michelle Yeoh tries to emulate. In The Tiger and the Widow, Hui Ying-hung is somehow mixed up in a salt smuggling ring that stinks of missing persons and rotten dilemmas.(n)

programme.title: Have Sword Will Travel
programme.desc: When the head of a manor loses his kung fu skills, he enlists his nephew and fiancée to escort gold to the capital. Along the way, they encounter a mysterious swordsman and join forces with him to stop bandits from stealing the gold.(n)

programme.title: The Last Tempest
programme.desc: This sequel to The Empress Dowager continues the tale of Emperor Guangxu and Empress Dowager Cixi. Despite Guangxu's enthronement, his ability to rule effectively is overshadowed by the ever-present power of Cixi. When his attempts to reform the Imperial system are thwarted by the Empress Dowager, Guangxu attempts to curb her power.(n)

programme.title: Rape of the Sword
programme.desc: The film starts out with two students fighting for their deceased master's sword called the "Green Frost Sword". Han kills the other student, takes the sword and offer it to the king. The wife of the other dead student plots to take revenge, going undercover to retrieve the sword at the first opportunity in this tale of revenge and betrayal.(n)

programme.title: The Lark
programme.desc: Sixties pop star Carrie Ku plays the "Little Lark" in this romantic-drama of mistaken identity that is a treasure trove of some of the most popular Mandarin songs of all time.(n)

programme.title: The Twelve Gold Medallions
programme.desc: This was one of top three films of 1970 and winner of "Outstanding Drama" at the 9th Golden Horse Awards. The evil minister uses twelve golden medallions to summon war hero Yueh Fei back from the frontline and execute him. A group of wandering warriors, led by Yueh Hua and Chin Ping, try to stop the medallion couriers.(n)

programme.title: Shaolin Martial Arts
programme.desc: The Qing government assigns fighters to destroy Shaolin Temple and kill all the disciples, but two of them successfully escaped. They train under different masters and learn the Wing Chun and Hung Quan styles respectively, finally killing the fighters and taking revenge for the death of their fellow disciples.(n)

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: Huan Zhu's ghost seeks help from “Fake Ghost Catchers” Bao Tuo and Zhou Peng, after a jealous suitor's ghost seeks vengeance by murdering her and now targeting her sister. Together with actor Wu Shun Chao who possesses a supernatural talent, they unite to protect Huan Zhu's sister from both mortal and spectral threats.(n)

programme.title: Hex after Hex
programme.desc: Hell may have no fury like a woman scorned, but hell literally, really has no wrath like a lusting ghost scorned! Cult classic director Kuei Chih-hung shoots the works with this amazing horror romance starring muscular "Venom" Lo Meng.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Ling Hsiao and Kuan Wang Lung are two guard chiefs working for an old convoy master. Lung is secretly in love with Fang Yen, the master's granddaughter but Yen is attracted to Ling Hsiao instead. In order to win her back, Lung sets up a trap to steal the convoy and frames Ling Hsiao for it.(n)

programme.title: Duel Of Fist
programme.desc: Fan Ke discovers at his father's deathbed that he has a half-brother, Wenlie, in Thailand. He goes to find Wenlie, who became a boxer to support his sick mother. Following their encounter, the two got involved in the underworld of boxing match gambling.(n)

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Carefree drifters Meng Gang and Tie Hu discover their purpose after meeting the revolutionary leader, Wan Tai. With the help of Meng Gang's girlfriend, they infiltrate a warlord camp to seize weapons for the revolutionary cause. Following a fierce battle, all three make the ultimate sacrifice, becoming the "Anonymous Heroes" of the revolution.(n)

programme.title: Asuraguru
programme.desc: The life of a high-tech robber with exceptional skills of evading the law changes when a private detective tries to get a hold of him.(n)

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail named Turbo gains super-speed. He dreams of racing in the Indianapolis 500. With his friends, he defies odds to prove anyone can achieve their dreams.(n)

programme.title: V
programme.desc: When aliens land on Earth claiming to help humanity, they seem friendly at first. But as they integrate into society, their hidden agenda starts to unfold.(n)

programme.title: 8 Thottakkal
programme.desc: Sathya, an honest policeman, accidentally loses his service pistol that ultimately lands into the hands of Murthy, who goes on a killing spree.(n)

programme.title: Mapla Singam
programme.desc: Amidst the rivalry of two castes in a village, a leader's daughter falls in love with a boy from the rival caste. Things take a turn when her cousin Anbu falls in love with the boy's sister.(n)

programme.title: Shivanagam
programme.desc: Naganika's family is in charge of an ancient monument that Kapali has his eyes set on. When Kapali kills her to seek the monument, Naganika is reborn as a snake in her next life to seek revenge.(n)

programme.title: Inji Iduppazhagi
programme.desc: Jennifer Aniston plays a young woman trying to find a husband but can't because she's overweight. She learns to love her body and leads an awareness campaign to fight against a slimness center.(n)

programme.title: Free Ticket
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.(n)

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a skull is found in a package, ACP Sathyajith is assigned to identify the victim and catch the killer. Meanwhile, a journalist haunted by a spirit investigates the mystery.(n)

programme.title: Gypsy
programme.desc: Gypsy, a musician, falls in love with Waheeda, who hails from a Muslim family. However, their marital bliss is shattered following a communal riot.(n)

programme.title: Uttama Villain
programme.desc: Manoranjan, a superstar, is counting his last days due to brain tumor. How he goes about his final wish of doing a comedy film with his mentor Margadarsi forms the crux of the story.(n)

programme.title: Salim
programme.desc: Salim, a doctor, runs into trouble for being too generous towards his patients. Soon, his patience with the justice system snaps and he takes the law into his own hands.(n)

programme.title: Irandam Ulagaporin Kadaisi Gundu
programme.desc: Selvam hopes to buy his own lorry and marry his lover Chittu. However, his dreams are disrupted when he ends up with an unexploded bomb.(n)

programme.title: Ace
programme.desc: Kannan moves to a foreign country seeking life, but gets dragged into shark circle. A heist turns hope into a curse, forcing him to outsmart fate.(n)

programme.title: Murder
programme.desc: After his beloved daughter elopes with an unworthy person, an emotional father chooses the hard path to make the corrections.(n)

programme.title: Gorilla
programme.desc: Jeeva and friends plan a bank heist with a chimpanzee. Hilarity ensues as their plan spirals into chaos, delivering laughs and unexpected twists along the way.(n)

programme.title: Kingston
programme.desc: In 1982, a curse falls on Thoovathor's sea. Kingston, a brave smuggler, and his friends sail into the haunted waters. Their mission: break the curse and save their village.(n)

programme.title: Haraa
programme.desc: Ram's happy life shatters when his daughter supposedly dies. He investigates, uncovering medical scams and a prostitution ring. He rescues Nimisha, revealing she was to be sold.(n)

programme.title: Smile Man
programme.desc: A comedy series where a cheerful man spreads joy, laughter, and lighthearted fun in his community.(n)

programme.title: Kiss
programme.desc: A street musician discovers he can glimpse couples' futures when they kiss. When a vision reveals his love, he races to defy destiny and change it.(n)

programme.title: Pookie
programme.desc: Kailash and Aazhi's six-year bond shatters when a routine argument escalates into a heated fight, turning into a life-changing moment that alters their relationship forever.(n)

programme.title: Deiva Machan
programme.desc: Karthi is guided by visions of a man on a white horse as he strives to arrange his sister's marriage. However, an ominous prophecy soon unfolds, bringing unexpected troubles his way.(n)

programme.title: Ghosty
programme.desc: Police officer, pursuing outlaw who escaped her father's custody 20 years ago, accidentally shoots someone else in a failed shootout.(n)

programme.title: Bottle Radha
programme.desc: Radha Mani, a mason addicted to alcohol, puts his family through misery. Even after his wife admits him to a rehabilitation centre, his destructive habits continue worsening.(n)

programme.title: Bommai Nayagi
programme.desc: A heartfelt tale explores a father-daughter bond as their lives are shaped and strained by politics and societal pressures, revealing resilience, sacrifice, and hope amid changing times.(n)

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: During a family cookout at a forest campsite, Charmcaster users her magic to switch places with Gwen, but when Ben catches "Charmcaster" sneaking about, he attacks- unaware it's actually his cursed cousin!(n)

programme.title: Ben 10

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: When attacked in the jungle, Team Tennyson is saved by a toddler who looks eerily similar to Tim Buktu, but when they discover it really is a pint-sized version of the nefarious globetrotter, Ben knows there's another threat looming: Nanny Nightmare!(n)

programme.title: Ben 10

programme.title: Ben 10

programme.title: CROUCHING TIGER, HIDDEN DRAGON
programme.desc: A martial arts film of grand illusion and poetic movement, Ang Lee's Oscar®-winning Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon is an epic love story opposed by treachery and lust for power. Chow Yun Fat (Anna And The King) stars as legendary master warrior Li Mu Bai, who hands over his magical sword, Green Destiny, to one-time romantic interest Yu Shu Lien (Michelle Yeoh, Tomorrow Never Dies) for her to deliver to a local governor. But when the jade sword is stolen, suspicion falls on Jade Fox (Cheng Pei Pei), a notorious fugitive who killed Li's master and secretly poses as a scheming attendant to the Governor's pliable daughter, Jen Yu (Zhang Ziyi). Under Jade's influence, Jen rejects a pre-arranged marriage and becomes a cat-like masked warrior who, nonetheless, finds her transition to the shadow world complicated by the appearance of Lo (Chang Chen), a long-lost love. As the quest for recovering Green Destiny features gravity-defying martial arts battles and surreal tableaus of ancient China, the ever-lasting themes of love and trying to conquer evil irrevocably change the lives of Li and Yu, and Jen and Lo.(n)

programme.title: M3GAN

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: When a captured serial killer hints at a missing child's location, Danny races against time.(n)

programme.title: SIGHT UNSEEN
programme.desc: Diagnosed with Leber's Neuropathy, homicide detective Tess Avery (Dolly Lewis) quits the police force after nearly getting her partner, Jake Campbell (Daniel Gillies), killed. Unwilling to accept help, or even admit her new reality, Tess turns to an assistive app to help navigate the world around her while still "passing" as sighted. Through the EyesUP app, Tess finds an unorthodox partner in Sunny Patel (Agam Darshi), an overly enthusiastic seeing eye guide working from her home in New York City who helps Tess investigate the brutal abduction of a young mother who may still be alive. But Sunny has a secret: she's an agoraphobe who only leaves her apartment through the eyes of her clients, and is hiding a violent event in her own past.(n)

programme.title: SIGHT UNSEEN
programme.desc: When the hit and run victim from one of Tess' (Dolly Lewis) former cases awakes from a coma, Sunny (Agam Darshi) encourages Tess to track down new leads even though she's no longer on the force. Tess' ex-partner Jake Campbell (Daniel Gillies) inherits Tess' case files along with a new partner, Leo Li (Tony Giroux), who is quick to dismiss the case as a dead end. As Tess makes progress, she discovers the incident is connected to a notorious unsolved murder. Meanwhile, Tess' best friend Matt (Jarod Joseph) encourages Tess to open up about her vision loss to Jake. Sunny, desperate to help Tess find leads, reveals her surprising financial situation and a dilemma on her doorstep - the very doorstep of her apartment that she is terrified to cross.(n)

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: The team investigates the brutal murder of a military sergeant found burned in her car, a case Franks suspects could have a connection to the assault of his estranged wife, Tish.(n)

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS

programme.title: CROUCHING TIGER, HIDDEN DRAGON
programme.desc: A martial arts film of grand illusion and poetic movement, Ang Lee's Oscar®-winning Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon is an epic love story opposed by treachery and lust for power. Chow Yun Fat (Anna And The King) stars as legendary master warrior Li Mu Bai, who hands over his magical sword, Green Destiny, to one-time romantic interest Yu Shu Lien (Michelle Yeoh, Tomorrow Never Dies) for her to deliver to a local governor. But when the jade sword is stolen, suspicion falls on Jade Fox (Cheng Pei Pei), a notorious fugitive who killed Li's master and secretly poses as a scheming attendant to the Governor's pliable daughter, Jen Yu (Zhang Ziyi). Under Jade's influence, Jen rejects a pre-arranged marriage and becomes a cat-like masked warrior who, nonetheless, finds her transition to the shadow world complicated by the appearance of Lo (Chang Chen), a long-lost love. As the quest for recovering Green Destiny features gravity-defying martial arts battles and surreal tableaus of ancient China, the ever-lasting themes of love and trying to conquer evil irrevocably change the lives of Li and Yu, and Jen and Lo.(n)

programme.title: Evolution Earth
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.(n)

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Hunt for missing nursery-class orphan Lahei and see shy Rumba try her weak left hand in a nest-building session. Watch younger Delilah school Bumi in class, then find out if Beni and Valentino will make the grade and finally earn their freedom.(n)

programme.title: Wildlife Er
programme.desc: Dive into a busy summer at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital, where vet Emily takes the pressure off a gassy koala mum. Shadow the team as they fight a wave of lorikeet paralysis syndrome and see vet Karina use a teddy bear to rescue a flying fox pup.(n)

programme.title: Wildlife Er
programme.desc: Join vets Emily and Martine in the OR, where Dolly the koala's spaying surgery takes a scary turn. Aid a run-over echidna with vet Nigel, see rescue officer Chantelle's slick fix for a snared lizard, and probe a possible birdnapping with vet Karina.(n)

programme.title: Uptown Otters
programme.desc: Stake out the Bay Family's lush territory, where matriarch Anna offers lavish feasts but faces internal dissent. Size up her rival Mia, the streetwise Townies leader who's eyeing a lifestyle upgrade, and check in with the isolated Mangrove Family.(n)

programme.title: Island Of The Monsoon
programme.desc: Monsoon storms sweep over the tropical island of Sri Lanka, and water carried in with swirling mists hits the mountainous heartland, beginning a journey through the many changing faces of the island's forests.(n)

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Join the search for a Cooper's hawk who's taken a dangerous dip in a backyard pool. Catch the hijinks of the centre's skunks as they try to avoid getting their shots, giving the team a closeup experience with the animals' stinky natural defences.(n)

programme.title: Wildlife Er

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Congratulate the new Orangutan Jungle School graduates, who aren't all spring chickens. Follow the convoy to the release site, where the team bids their friends a poignant farewell, then enjoy raucous celebrations as Molly and Bumi move up a grade.(n)

programme.title: Chasing The Rains
programme.desc: Travel to Samburu, where matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up. Then, in Naboisho, see cheetah mom Kuleta evade a crafty pack of hyenas. Later, in Laikipia, check in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter.(n)

programme.title: Chasing The Rains
programme.desc: Discover the clever way elephants dig wells, and see the relief that comes with a sudden river-filling downpour. Mourn cheetah Kuleta's loss after lions kill one of her cubs, and get a front-row seat when wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.(n)

programme.title: Uptown Otters
programme.desc: Swim upriver with the Bay Family, where Anna offers a hand raising her grandpups before heading home to find interlopers on her turf. Watch a flood in the mangroves nearly sweep away a baby, and see the Townies eat clean through their resources.(n)

programme.title: Island Of The Monsoon
programme.desc: Yala National Park is an avian Eden, home to 215 species of bird. This paradise offers many possibilities for parents who can weather the ever-changing climate. Every species must either raise their offspring here or find a new home before the dry season ends and the monsoon storms begin.(n)

programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.(n)

programme.title: Beasts Of The Big Blue
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands' massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.(n)

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: When a baby mink is abandoned in a store, the team gets to work on some behavioural training. But will this sweet little one be tough enough for the wild when they're done? Visit with a mange-afflicted coyote who's enjoying some alone time to heal.(n)

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Wombat
programme.desc: In the cool highlands near Australia's Snowy Mountains is Wombat Wood. There, dotted amongst the trees and dense foliage, are over a hundred wombat burrows. But when some of the burrows are flooded, the wombats need to find safety.(n)

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: As the popular characters of songs and stories, farm animals are celebrated all over the world. But few stories tell of their sister species who live in the wild. These animals known primarily as livestock, beasts of burden, or even pets must fend for themselves beyond the fences of their domesticated kin.(n)

programme.title: Land Of Primates
programme.desc: Millions of years ago, castaway creatures were stranded on the rugged shores of Madagascar. Left to evolve on their own, they've found a way to perfectly adapt to their tropical climate. Now, see what life is like for a family of ring-tailed lemurs.(n)

programme.title: Land Of Primates
programme.desc: The island is the land of Lemurs. Lemurs are fascinating arboreal primitive primates of Madagascar represented in all sizes, colors, and shapes from the largest Indri to the tiny mouse lemur.(n)

programme.title: Land Of Primates
programme.desc: Hogsback, South Africa, is home to two fascinating primates: The Samango monkeys and the Cape Parrots. See how they overcome habit loss, travel across town for food, and make the most of a difficult situation.(n)

programme.title: Land Of Primates
programme.desc: The Bambelela Troop is a successful and gregarious troop of Chacma Baboons that live in a pristine valley in the Waterberg Mountains of South Africa. But they have a problem—they're not the only baboons around.(n)

programme.title: Wild Survivors
programme.desc: The drive to reproduce is one of nature's most primal forces. And with over a hundred thousand animal species in Africa, countless strategies have evolved. Discover how the residents of Zambia's Luangwa Valley strive to pass on their genes.(n)

programme.title: Amazing Animal Friends
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.(n)

programme.title: Amazing Animal Friends
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a troop of rescue center monkeys that have adopted a litter of stray kittens, a loyal dog helping a rescued raccoon overcome her fears, and an emu raised by Irish setters.(n)

programme.title: Amazing Animal Friends
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, including “ranch manager” Barclay, a Great Dane who happens to be a gifted horse whisperer. In Africa, a tiny marmoset called Thor has become obsessed with two young rescued mongooses.(n)

programme.title: Uptown Otters
programme.desc: Stake out the Bay Family's lush territory, where matriarch Anna offers lavish feasts but faces internal dissent. Size up her rival Mia, the streetwise Townies leader who's eyeing a lifestyle upgrade, and check in with the isolated Mangrove Family.(n)

programme.title: Uptown Otters
programme.desc: Swim upriver with the Bay Family, where Anna offers a hand raising her grandpups before heading home to find interlopers on her turf. Watch a flood in the mangroves nearly sweep away a baby, and see the Townies eat clean through their resources.(n)

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard the rockhopper penguin, and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon in her golden years. Later, say an emotional goodbye as Rocco the wombat returns to the wild.(n)

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Celebrate Cash the house donkey's birthday, then play hide-and-seek with Milton the skunk. Meet Bjornar the beaver, who has a very important job, and explore the importance of cuddles and naps with Bentley the tree kangaroo and his human mum.(n)

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Check in on Elsa the sloth with Pedro, who has dedicated his life to her care after a fall left her paralyzed. Learn why Thor the wolf welcomed his human, Steve, into his pack, then watch Kristen and Beau make life accessible for Crystal the raccoon.(n)

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Learn to swim with Ozzy the otter and his coach, Leslie, then see how Petronel has earned the trust of Riri the rhino orphan, who was traumatized by poachers. Sniff out land mines with Kobe the rat and free-dive with Gaia the hammerhead shark.(n)

programme.title: Life's Journey
programme.desc: For the first few weeks of life, the world is a frightening place. Danger lurks around every corner. It pays to be alert. Whether predator or prey. Any day might be your last. The race is on to grow up fast- for even the largest animals are vulnerable to attack.(n)

programme.title: Life's Journey
programme.desc: If young animals survive until adulthood, the chances for survival are greatly increased - but many challenges face them before they can strike out on their own. Some have months to grow-up; other have decades - but all, have lots to learn along the way. From getting to grips with their bodies and learning to feed themselves, to practicing fighting skills and learning how to form friendships. There are many hurdles along the way, but every small success could mean the difference between life and death.(n)

programme.title: Life's Journey
programme.desc: For every species on earth the right to mate is the purpose of life. Passing on your genes to the next generation is every animal's legacy. But it's not easy, it can be a struggle to find a mate and then a fight to gain access. Only the strongest and most determined will win at Luangwa's mating game.(n)

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard the rockhopper penguin, and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon in her golden years. Later, say an emotional goodbye as Rocco the wombat returns to the wild.(n)

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Celebrate Cash the house donkey's birthday, then play hide-and-seek with Milton the skunk. Meet Bjornar the beaver, who has a very important job, and explore the importance of cuddles and naps with Bentley the tree kangaroo and his human mum.(n)

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Check in on Elsa the sloth with Pedro, who has dedicated his life to her care after a fall left her paralyzed. Learn why Thor the wolf welcomed his human, Steve, into his pack, then watch Kristen and Beau make life accessible for Crystal the raccoon.(n)

programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he's faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!(n)

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!(n)

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”.(n)

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Mr. Tanaka adopts an unruly dog at Sam's behest, the Zenkos have the job of training the mischievous mutt and turning him into man's best friend material. / When Ellie's friend Maria is late submitting her painting to the art show, it's up to the Zenkos to get inside the community center after hours, avoiding overzealous junior security Rodney, and get Maria's painting on display before the show starts.(n)

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.(n)

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...(n)

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants' brain and defeat the nanobots' leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants' brain cells to the rescue! And when it's all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.(n)

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.(n)

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Gran announces it's time to choose a new Thunder Sisters Queen, Ugga assumes she's got it in the bag. But after a series of challenges (the Thunder Games), it becomes clear Gran might not be ready to step down.(n)

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Guy is always surprising Eep with romantic gestures and Eep wants to return the favor. But when Guy proves impossible to surprise, Eep has to step up her game.(n)

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: The Crood and Betterman parents have been struggling to get along - they're so different! The two couple realize they need some time apart and decide to get away from the farm and each other. Too bad both couples choose to take a break on the same, small beach.(n)

programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip willfully get babysat by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras. But the plan is thrown for a loop when Tina's first night alone without her parents makes her fall for their sitter Mia as a "substitute mommy." Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team.".(n)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Uncuddleables have struck the Lil Dumpling baby pageant, replacing all of Baby Corp's super-cute top 5%er babies with not-cute bottom 5%ers. Boss, Tina and their field team race to caravan the 5%ers from their homes to the pageant before Nannycam deploys the nuclear option of unleashing the dangerously cute UBO on stage to salvage a Lil Dumpling win.(n)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss Baby and Tina reject the 5%er system that says the cuter you are, the more love you deserve. Teaming up with the Uncuddleables, the team tries to take down the system from within, forming a resistance of the eight department heads of Baby Corp in the hopes of changing the way we look at Baby Love forever.(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade's life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini's hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she's been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.(n)

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The gang breaks into Stricklers office for clues to Killahead Bridge but ends up releasing a monster into school and Strickler reveals his true form.(n)

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jims Trollhunting life and his high school life collide when Claire becomes a target for Goblin revenge.(n)

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim must surrender to Bular and unlock the Killahead Bridge to save kidnapped Blinky and promises Claire that he will get her brother back.(n)

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: During her last days on Earth, Aja decides to tell Steve the truth: she's an alien. But her plans are complicated when the Zerons abduct Aja, Steve and Krel. Meanwhile, Vex struggles with an impossible choice: saving the Royal teens or the Royal Cores.(n)

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With the Mothership ready for liftoff, Aja and Krel celebrate their last day on Earth at Battle of the Bands. But their world is rocked when Zadra arrives with a startling revelation about Vex - and a new enemy threatens their departure.(n)

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Omen hijacks the Mothership and Royal Cores, all seems lost for our heroes. The Royal heirs are able to defeat the killer Blank, but at a high cost.(n)

programme.desc: The Templetons head to a new family restaurant only to run into Bootsy Calico!(n)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Baby Corp babies start aging, panic hits the office and the babies set out to find out if someone has been tainting the formula.(n)

programme.desc: Ty Rux leads the Dinotrux on a nighttime raid to rescue Ton-Ton who's been snatched by a pack of Scraptors and taken to their hive in Scraptor Valley.(n)

programme.desc: A near-accident gives Chet his first adrenaline rush, and in his quest for another he enters a dangerous race inside a pinball machine. programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The FAST crew is tricked into going to Africa by the Queen of the Banana Slugs for a dangerous journey through the plains in order to save her tribe. programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: The Reflesherator When Professor Burns requires a substitute teacher, Flyboy's dad volunteers for the job. Master Blister The students of Scare School are thrilled after a prank played on Alder and Dash results in their firing.(n)

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Casper, the Match Maker When Frankengymteacher gets extra crabby, the kids realize he's secretly in love with their history teacher, Hedy. Jimmy Bradley: Creature Catcher On “take your kid to work day,” Jimmy's dad invites him to tag along as a junior ghost catcher.(n)

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.(n)

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the trees start losing their leaves, Phoebe begins knitting the trees in the park sweaters, but when the neighborhood kids see the sweaters they think they're a mysterious "Yarn Fairy," and they want to see her in action, making it much harder for the Dews to put more sweaters on the latest trees that have lost their leaves. / When Marcus and Harper team-up for a school project, they decide to bake something ("It's like inventing, but with food!"), only to come across multiple baking misshaps (and happy accidents) along the way that the Dew Drops must secretly assist them with.(n)

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When "something" starts snatching things and causing havoc in Marcus' house, Phoebe and the Dew Drops investigate only to find that it's a stray kitten that they need to catch and find a home for before Marcus returns home. But in the end, Marcus decides to take the kitty in, as his own. / Lola isn't very good at “Hide & Seek” so the Dew Drops help her improve her game. But she becomes so good that no one can find her! And now she's going to be late to her own surprise tea party!(n)

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.(n)

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!(n)

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria sneaks into the NY Ballet to audition for “Swan Lake” and gets rejected (not for her dancing, but because she's a hippo), Gloria's belief in herself is tested.(n)

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to “Best Fans Day” at NY's Giraffe Stadium, where Alex gets caught up in the attention of rooting for the winning team. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is swept by an ocean current to the shore of Unicorn Land where he sees a majestic creature on a cliff that looks just like him, but not like his Narwhal family under the sea. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.(n)

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Bester's record attempt is at risk when Best steals her thunder by being the robot instead of learning the robot. On a search for the first woodpecker in spring, Best finds that he's in very much in tune with nature after all.(n)

programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina help the Flim-Flam brothers hunt the ghost that haunts their house. On her day off from the Patrick Show, Squidina helps Rube produce his TV show.(n)

programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.(n)

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon a door they have never seen before in the Man's Nest and are determined to see what's behind it despite Ray telling them it's off limits. However, once they get inside, they must deal with the dangerous and bizarre consequences.(n)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry and the other kids destroy Ray's prized movie prop, The Theranos Boot. To replace it, Henry and Jasper travel to an alternate universe Man Cave using Bill Evil's inter-dimensional transporter and steal their Theranos Boot before Ray finds out.(n)

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters enlist the "Master of Convincing" (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. Lisa gets her report card and finds she's failed 'social skills'. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.(n)

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.(n)

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana struggles to shake off Lily when she starts to follow Lana around like a shadow.(n)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.desc: Patrick hires other Patricks to entertain at parties. Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.(n)

programme.desc: Ep99, Ep100, Ep101, Ep102, Ep104-When we last saw Gumball, he was hitting rewind on Rob's Universal Remote, just in time to save himself from being trapped in The Void. The remote has now taken Gumball back to the beginning of that disastrous day. Armed with the knowledge of what this day has in store, he must try and stop Rob from destroying his life.(n)

programme.title: Mechamato
programme.desc: Ep3-Amato brings a damaged MechaBot back to the Prison Spaceship for repairs, but is stopped by the ship's defense system.(n)

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Ep2A, Ep2B-Robin is inadvertently the getaway driver for a bank robbery, in the midst of his driving test.(n)

programme.title: Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Ep319-The Ninja reach the Caves of Bells while Lloyd and Arin fight their way through the Spectral Lands to summon the Arc Dragon.(n)

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: Ep157, Ep158, Ep159, Ep160, Ep161-After Blossom and Buttercup break Schedulebot, they'll do anything to keep the truth from coming out.(n)

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Ep11A, Ep11B, Ep12A, Ep12B, Ep13A-Gumball and Darwin's wish comes true when they suddenly turn into men.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ep29, Ep30-Mr Bean is stuck in a lift and starts to annoy the other passengers.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ep115, Ep124-In a dark and cobwebby corner of his attic, Mr. Bean finds a treasure map. The hunt is on! But tricky clues lead Bean up the chimney, round the bend, down the garden path, up the blinking wall and nearly all the way to Australia.(n)

programme.title: Super Shiro
programme.desc: Ep29, Ep30, Ep31, Ep32-Traces of the Bobobobobone are detected at a tooth exhibition. Shiro examines the various models of animal teeth when Deca begins chasing after Shiro.(n)

programme.title: Exchange Student Zero
programme.desc: Ep5-An inferior set of Battle Day Zero cards is mysteriously released as a giveaway by a potato chip company. Hiro is on the case but the boys are distracted by the arrival of a giant devil baby Sweet Potato.(n)

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Ep60B, Ep61A, Ep61B, Ep62A, Ep62B-Depressed by his feelings with Flame Princess, Finn enters a pillow fort where he enters a new world and makes a new life for himself.(n)

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Ep28, Ep29, Ep30-Steven attempts to build a spaceship to let Pearl revisit the wonders of the cosmos.(n)

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Ep1, Ep21, Ep76, Ep83, Ep135-Rigby steals a magic keyboard from a preoccupied sorcerer. When Mordecai and Rigby accidentally make a hole in the wall while wrestling a stuffed animal, they use the keyboard to make Pops and Benson give them raises to try to pay for it.(n)

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Ep109, Ep232, Ep231, Ep230, Ep114-In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!(n)

programme.title: Courage The Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Ep13B, Ep25B, Ep30A, Ep30B, Ep6B-A travelling stage arrives at the farm manned by an evil stage master, who turns Muriel and the Farmer into puppets. Courage must save the day once again.(n)

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Ep2, Ep34, Ep71, Ep97, Ep139-While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.(n)

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Ep260, Ep168, Ep170, Ep175, Ep241-Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on the road again and are supposed to be taking in the beautiful sights, but Ben refuses to put his video games away.(n)

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Ep1140, Ep1141, Ep1142, Ep1143, Ep1144-The other Titans train Beast Boy in the ways of the ninja.(n)

programme.title: Lamput
programme.desc: Ep341, Ep342-The Docs can't keep up with Lamput and he manages to escape them at every move. Inspired by the animals at a local zoo, the Docs build a machine to harness the animal prowess. Maybe now they can be as fast as a cheetah and outrun Lamput!(n)

programme.title: Grizzy And The Lemmings
programme.desc: Ep349, Ep327, Ep354, Ep302, Ep358, Ep333, Ep326-While Grizzy fishes, a penguin comes over and sees that the bear's bucket is empty. He decides to help him and catches piles of fish.(n)

programme.title: The Tom And Jerry Show
programme.desc: Ep23B, Ep24A, Ep24B, Ep25A, Ep25B-Fed up with Tom, Hildie and Beatie threaten to get a "real" witch's cat: a black cat. In desperation, Tom takes a magic potion that makes him turn black but only temporarily.(n)

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.(n)

programme.title: Japan Hour
programme.desc: Kumamoto Prefecture is the stage for cycling this time. The area, in the center of the island of Kyushu, is recovering from an earthquake in 2016. The program starts in the city of Kumamoto and works its way around the Amakusa island chain. It then heads for Mount Aso, where one of the world's largest volcanic craters is located. Meet the people and see the sights of this 4-day, 300km bicycle journey.(n)

programme.desc: Rancangan bual bicara bersama tetamu di studio mengupas topik semasa tanah air.(n)

programme.desc: Berita semasa dalam dan luar negara yang mengandungi berita am, politik, ekonomi, niaga dan sukan.(n)

programme.title: The Nation
programme.desc: The Nation is a talkshow on the who's who and the everyday people. Everyone has a story, what's yours?(n)

programme.title: Radio@TV
programme.desc: Saksikan BERNAMA Radio bersiaran dari konti BERNAMA Radio dengan perkembangan berita terkini.(n)

programme.title: Apa Khabar Malaysia
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara pagi berbahasa Melayu yang mengetengahkan isu-isu semasa dari portal Bernama, perkembangan terkini dari Biro/Koresponden Bernama serta hujahan pendapat dari tetamu jemputan dan menjadi platform hebahan kepada penonton terutamanya maklumat kerajaan dan badan bukan kerajaan.(n)

programme.title: Sidang Dewan Rakyat
programme.desc: Mesyuarat ahli-ahli Parlimen untuk membincangkan isu negara, menggubal undang-undang, meluluskan perbelanjaan kerajaan dan memantau pentadbiran kerajaan. Sidang ini penting bagi memastikan suara rakyat diwakili dalam sistem demokrasi Malaysia.(n)

programme.title: Buletin Bernama
programme.desc: Berita semasa dalam dan luar negara yang mengandungi berita am, politik, ekonomi, niaga dan sukan.(n)

programme.title: Sidang Dewan Rakyat
programme.desc: Mesyuarat ahli-ahli Parlimen untuk membincangkan isu negara, menggubal undang-undang, meluluskan perbelanjaan kerajaan dan memantau pentadbiran kerajaan. Sidang ini penting bagi memastikan suara rakyat diwakili dalam sistem demokrasi Malaysia.(n)

programme.title: Berita Mandarin Rtm-Bernama TV
programme.desc: Perkongsian Berita Mandarin RTM disiarkan serentak pada 12 tengah hari setiap hari di saluran TV2 dan BERNAMA TV, serta perkongsian Berita Mandarin BERNAMA juga di kedua-dua saluran pada pukul 6.30 petang setiap hari mulai 6hb Disember 2025. Tidak kira siang atau malam, kami berkongsi satu kepercayaan - menyampaikan kebenaran, menghubungkan kita semua.(n)

programme.title: Sidang Dewan Rakyat
programme.desc: Mesyuarat ahli-ahli Parlimen untuk membincangkan isu negara, menggubal undang-undang, meluluskan perbelanjaan kerajaan dan memantau pentadbiran kerajaan. Sidang ini penting bagi memastikan suara rakyat diwakili dalam sistem demokrasi Malaysia.(n)

programme.title: Kapsul Malaysia Petang Ini
programme.desc: Kapsul Malaysia Petang Ini memaparkan sorotan terbaik daripada program temubual harian Malaysia Petang Ini, menampilkan topik terkini, informatif dan relevan. Disampaikan secara ringkas dan padat, ia menyediakan kupasan komprehensif terhadap isu-isu semasa yang memberi impak kepada masyarakat.(n)

programme.title: Apa Kata Tetamu
programme.desc: Program mingguan terbitan BERNAMA TV ini merangkumkan temubual bersama tetamu yang bersiaran bersama Apa Khabar Malaysia. Informasi yang dipaparkan saban minggu menarik lagi bermanfaat buat penonton di saluran BERNAMA TV.(n)

programme.title: Bernama World
programme.desc: A comprehensive roundup of world news, covering a spectrum of events including political updates, economic trends, humanitarian efforts, environmental issues, and cultural highlights. programme.title: Podcast Kasih Lensa Keluarga 2
programme.desc: Sebuah program podcast bual bicara yang mengangkat pelbagai isu berkaitan pembangunan keluarga, dasar serta inisiatif kerajaan khususnya melalui Lembaga Penduduk dan Pembangunan Keluarga Negara (LPPKN). Setiap episod mengetengahkan topik-topik yang menyentuh reality masyarakat - dari perancangan keluarga, kesihatan reproduktif, hubungan kekeluargaan, kepada isu-isu kontemporari seperti keseimbangan kerja dan rumah, sokongan kesihatan mental, dan hak-hak wanita dan remaja dalam institusi keluarga moden.(n)

programme.desc: We pursue the shape-shifting trickster Mujina in this episode - this being associated with raccoon dogs is known on Niigata Prefecture's Sado island as human, animal, yokai and deity.(n)

programme.title: UFC Fight Night: Kape vs. Horiguchi - Main
programme.desc: A crucial matchup between flyweight contenders headlines UFC's return to action at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas on Saturday, June 21 as second-ranked contender Manel “Starboy” Kape faces off with fifthranked Kyoji Horiguchi. A winner of seven of his last eight appearances and each of his last three outings, Kape makes his 2026 debut off a first-round knockout win over former title challenger Brandon Royval last December in the same building. A title challenger during his first stint with the promotion, Horiuchi has earned back-to-back wins since returning to the UFC last November and looks to cement his standing as a contender with a third straight standout performance.(n)

programme.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 316: Dvalishvili vs O'Malley
programme.desc: UFC 316 Countdown previews two bantamweight title fights. In the main event, men's champion Merab “The Machine” Dvalishvili battles “Suga” Sean O'Malley in a rematch. In the co-main event, women's title holder Julianna Pena takes on Kayla Harrison.(n)

programme.title: BUNDESLIGA 60 YEARS RECORDS COMPILATION - BUNDESLIGA 60 YEARS RECORDS COMPILATION
programme.desc: Goals, saves and other superhuman feats that have graced the Bundesliga. Since inception in 1963, who stands atop the Bundesliga charts?(n)

programme.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - Group - MYANMAR vs MALAYSIA - (TEAM)
programme.desc: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation's historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.(n)

programme.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 313: Pereira vs Ankalaev
programme.desc: After a historic 2024 that saw him defend his UFC light heavyweight title three times with three knockouts, Brazilian superstar Alex Pereira begins the new year in Las Vegas with a main event clash against number one contender Magomed Ankalaev. Plus former interim lightweight champion Justin Gaithje battles Rafael Fiziev for the second time, and much much more on UFC Reloaded.(n)
